          $_ret9100 := 0
          while(($_ret9100 <= (num_elements(%subarticulation_id_start) - 1)) and ($group_count000 = 0)) 
            @g_name0 := !subarticulations_title_group[search(%subarticulations_ids, %subarticulation_id_start[$_ret9100])]
            if(get_group_idx(@g_name0) # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
              $group_count001 := $_ret9100
              $group_count000 := 1
              continue
            end if
            inc($_ret9100)
          end while
          if($group_count000 = 1)
            continue
          end if
          $group_count001 := -1
          $group_count000 := 1
          continue
        end while
        $ii7 := $group_count001
        if($ii7 # -1)
          @ret1 := !instrument_name[$ii7]
          $iii2 := 1
          continue
        else
          @ret1 := "Unknown Instrument"
          $iii2 := 1
          continue
        end if
      end while
      @path20 := @ret1
      @preset_path := @articulations_path & @path20 & " Articulations/"
    end if
    message("Preset Path: " & @preset_path)
    if(- sh_right(abs(%development[0] - 22714) - 1, 31) = 1)
      message("***** Script is in DEVELOPMENT Mode *****")
    else
      message("***** Script is in FINAL Mode *****")
    end if
    if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%decode[0] - 81202) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
      message("***** Script is ENCODED *****")
    end if

    declare %center_circles_frame_sums[32]
    %center_circles_frame_sums[0] := 0
    %center_circles_frame_sums[1] := 31
    $i := 2
    while($i <= 31) 
      %center_circles_frame_sums[$i] := (%center_circles_frame_sums[$i - 1] + 31) - ($i - 1)
      inc($i)
    end while
    declare %lbl_center_circle[4]

      inc($_iter0)
    end while

      set_control_par_str(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_line_lyr" & ($i + 1))

    while($i <= (num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope) - 1)) 
      set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "")
      set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope")
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + $i)
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - 50)
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, 2)
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 50)
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL, get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page))
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 0)
      inc($i)

    declare ui_button $btn_editor_overview1 
    declare ui_button $btn_editor_overview2 
    declare ui_button $btn_editor_overview3

      inc($_iter0)

    $i := 0
    while($i <= 3) 
      set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Layer " & ($i + 1))
      set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "alpha")
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT_ALIGNMENT, 0)
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, 0)
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXTPOS_Y, 20)
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 627)
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, 300)
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 50)
      $ret21 := %btn_editor_overview[$i]
      $i28020 := 0
      while($i28020 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
        set_control_par($ret21, %font_types[$i28020], %fonts_regular_white[$i28020])
        inc($i28020)
      end while
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL, get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview))
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 0)
      set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview_solo[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "")
      set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview_solo[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_solo")
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_solo[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 627)
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_solo[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 18)
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_solo[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL, get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview))
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_solo[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 0)
      set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview_mute[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "")
      set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview_mute[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_mute")
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_mute[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 647)
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_mute[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 18)
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_mute[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL, get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview))

      ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
      ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] + %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
      ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
      ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.

      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0]) * 225.))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 225)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * 224.))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]) * 224.))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
    end if

      set_control_par(%mnu_mixer_channel_out[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, 0)

    declare %_category_counter0[6]
    $ii6 := 0
    $_iter0 := 0

      %_category_counter0[$_iter0] := 0
      inc($_iter0)
    end while
    $ii6 := 0
    while($ii6 <= 511) 
      if((%subarticulations_ids[$ii6] >= 0) and (%subarticulations_group_idx[$ii6] >= 0))
        %_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%subarticulations_instrument[$ii6] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + ((%type_to_category[%subarticulations_type[$ii6]] * 32) + %_category_counter0[(%subarticulations_instrument[$ii6] * 6) + %type_to_category[%subarticulations_type[$ii6]]])] := %subarticulations_ids[$ii6]
        %_category_counter0[(%subarticulations_instrument[$ii6] * 6) + %type_to_category[%subarticulations_type[$ii6]]] := %_category_counter0[(%subarticulations_instrument[$ii6] * 6) + %type_to_category[%subarticulations_type[$ii6]]] + 1
      end if
      inc($ii6)
    end while
    $e0 := 0
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
    $selected_category := 0
    $i34 := 0
    while($i34 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
      if($i34 = $e0)
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$i34], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$i34], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
      inc($i34)
    end while
    $use_smoothing0 := 0
    $i34 := 0
    while($i34 <= 31) 
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($e0 * 32) + $i34)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
        $use_smoothing0 := $i34
      end if
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($e0 * 32) + $i34)] = -1)
        $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $i34
        $i34 := 32
      end if
      inc($i34)
    end while
    if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      $use_smoothing0 := 0
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
      $use_smoothing0 := $use_smoothing0 - (($use_smoothing0 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $use_smoothing0, 31))
    end if
    $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $e0
    message("loaded_subarticulations: " & %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
    $result1 := $use_smoothing0
    $note_selection0 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)

    $group_count001 := 128

                $i10 := %subarticulations_range_lower[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)]]] * 12)
              end if
              if((%subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)]]] * 12)) > $_ret9100)
                $_ret9100 := %subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)]]] * 12)

            end if

      $group_count001 := $group_count001 - (($group_count001 - %_instrument_range[$group_count000 * 2]) .and. sh_right(%_instrument_range[$group_count000 * 2] - $group_count001, 31))

      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] * -1)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope) - 1)) 
        set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(round(real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) + (real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.) - int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) * pow(real($i) / real(num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope)), (real(%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 100.) + 1.)))))
        set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - get_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 5) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 40))
        $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 0
      else
        if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 40))
          $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 1
        else
          if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 5) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
            $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 2
          else
            if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
              $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 3
            else
              if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
                $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 4
              else
                $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 5
              end if
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
      $countdown0 := $selected_subarticulation
      $time1 := 0
      while($time1 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
        if($time1 # $countdown0)
          set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$time1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$time1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        end if
        inc($time1)
      end while
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
        $displayed_subarticulation := $selected_subarticulation
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] # -1)
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "    " & !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]])
        else
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "    Empty")
        end if
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_solo_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_solo_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mute_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_mute_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_layer_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $selected_subarticulation)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_volume[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_layer_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 4)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        $i := 0
        while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_editor_overview) - 1)) 
          if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)] # -1)
            set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "         " & !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]]])
            set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[0])
          else
            set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "         Empty")
            set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[6])
          end if
          inc($i)
        end while
      end if
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_repetition_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_repetition_speed_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_rr_mode), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_rr_mode_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
        if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 0) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 5))
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_tightness[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])

          set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_rr_mode_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

        if(((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 0) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 5)) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 9))
          $mnu_subarticulation_repetition_speed := %_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_repetition_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_repetition_speed_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        end if
        if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 2) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 9))
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_volume[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
          $btn_subarticulation_trans_speed := %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed_auto[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
          if($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed = 1)
            set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
          end if
        end if
      end if
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 3) 
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)] # -1)
          set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
          if($i = $selected_subarticulation)
            set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
            set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
          end if
          $result001 := %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
          $result000 := %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
          $seed00 := int(round((real($result001) / 127.) * real(31 + (sh_right($result001 - 32, 31) + 1))))
          $_ret870 := int((real($result000) / 127.) * 31.)
          set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %center_circles_frame_sums[$seed00] + $_ret870)
          set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $result001)
          set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $result000)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
        ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
        ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] + %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
        ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
        ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0]) * 225.))
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 225)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * 224.))
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]) * 224.))
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
      end if
      ?xy_dynamic_range[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
      ?xy_dynamic_range[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[0] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
      $any_event_active1 := %modulation_positions[0]
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_cursor), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 3) + int((real((($any_event_active1 * (1 + (sh_right(127 - $any_event_active1, 31) .or. sh_right($any_event_active1 - 1, 31)))) - sh_right($any_event_active1 - 1, 31)) - (127 * sh_right(127 - $any_event_active1, 31))) / 127.) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))))
      if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_back")
        $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
        if($selected_subarticulation < 0)
          $selected_subarticulation := 0
          $btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all := 0
          $countdown0 := 0
          $time1 := 0
          while($time1 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
            if($time1 # $countdown0)
              set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$time1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
            else
              set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$time1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
            end if
            inc($time1)
          end while
        end if

          $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
          $selected_category := $e0
          $i34 := 0
          while($i34 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
            if($i34 = $e0)

            else
              set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$i34], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
            end if
            inc($i34)
          end while
          $use_smoothing0 := 0
          $i34 := 0
          while($i34 <= 31) 
            if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($e0 * 32) + $i34)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
              $use_smoothing0 := $i34
            end if
            if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($e0 * 32) + $i34)] = -1)
              $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $i34
              $i34 := 32
            end if
            inc($i34)
          end while
          if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)

            $use_smoothing0 := 0
          else
            set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
            set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
            $use_smoothing0 := $use_smoothing0 - (($use_smoothing0 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $use_smoothing0, 31))
          end if
          $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $e0
          message("loaded_subarticulations: " & %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
          $result1 := $use_smoothing0
          $note_selection0 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
          $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($note_selection0 - (($result1 * $note_selection0) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($note_selection0 - (($result1 * $note_selection0) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($note_selection0 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $note_selection0))
          $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($note_selection0 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $note_selection0
          $i := 0
          while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
            if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
              set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
              if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
                set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
              else

          $note_selection0 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
          $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($note_selection0 - (($result1 * $note_selection0) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($note_selection0 - (($result1 * $note_selection0) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($note_selection0 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $note_selection0))
          $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($note_selection0 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $note_selection0
          $i := 0
          while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
            if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
              set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
              if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
                set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
              else
                set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
              end if
              set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
            end if
            inc($i)
          end while
          if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
            set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
          else
            set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if

function Preset______decr__
  $instrument_slot1 := $string0101
  while($instrument_slot1 # -1) 
    $keyswitch10 := 0
    %Preset____allocation[$instrument_slot1] := %Preset____allocation[$instrument_slot1] - $event1
    if(%Preset____allocation[$instrument_slot1] > 0)
      $instrument_slot1 := -1
      continue
    else
      %Preset____allocation[$instrument_slot1] := 0
    end if
    $string0101 := $instrument_slot1
    $instrument_slot1 := -1
    $event3 := %Preset____tags[$string0101]
    $inst1 := 1
    $ks6 := $event3
    while($ks6 # -1) 
      $timing0 := 0
      %Floatmask____allocation[$ks6] := %Floatmask____allocation[$ks6] - $inst1
      if(%Floatmask____allocation[$ks6] > 0)
        $ks6 := -1
        continue
      else
        %Floatmask____allocation[$ks6] := 0
      end if
      $event3 := $ks6
      $ks6 := -1
      $timing0 := 0
      while($timing0 <= 1) 
        $_short_circuit30 := %_Floatmask____fm[($event3 * 2) + $timing0]
        $_ret560 := 1
        $articulation_id2 := $_short_circuit30
        while($articulation_id2 # -1) 
          $ret17 := 0
          %Bitlist____allocation[$articulation_id2] := %Bitlist____allocation[$articulation_id2] - $_ret560
          if(%Bitlist____allocation[$articulation_id2] > 0)
            $articulation_id2 := -1
            continue
          else
            %Bitlist____allocation[$articulation_id2] := 0
          end if
          $_short_circuit30 := $articulation_id2
          $articulation_id2 := -1
          $articulation_event_is_empty0 := $_short_circuit30
          $all_inactive0 := 0
          if($articulation_event_is_empty0 # -1)
            %Bitlist____val[$articulation_event_is_empty0] := 0
          end if
        end while
        inc($timing0)
      end while
      $i3700 := $event3
      $string020 := 0
      if($i3700 # -1)
        $_iter17 := 0
        while($_iter17 <= 1) 
          %_Floatmask____fm[($i3700 * 2) + $_iter17] := -1
          inc($_iter17)
        end while
      end if
    end while
    $note1 := $string0101
    $result6 := 0
    if($note1 # -1)
      %Preset____deleted[$note1] := 0
      !Preset____file[$note1] := ""
      %Preset____info[$note1] := 0
      %Preset____tags[$note1] := -1
      !Preset____name[$note1] := ""
      %Preset____idx[$note1] := 0
    end if
  end while
end function
function Preset______incr__
  if($transition0 # -1)
    %Preset____allocation[$transition0] := %Preset____allocation[$transition0] + $result10
  end if
end function
function PresetBrowser__update_ks_selector
  $ret24 := 0
  $note_number0 := 0
  while($note_number0 <= (num_elements(%btn_ks_selector) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%btn_ks_selector[$note_number0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    set_control_par_str(%btn_ks_selector[$note_number0], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "")
    set_control_par(%btn_ks_selector[$note_number0], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, 16)
    if($note_number0 = $articulation_id0)
      if(%_keyswitch_preset[($selected_instrument * 8) + $note_number0] # -1)
        $string0101 := %Browser____current[$browser]
        $event1 := 1
        call Preset______decr__
        %Browser____current[$browser] := %_keyswitch_preset[($selected_instrument * 8) + $note_number0]
        $transition0 := %Browser____current[$browser]
        $result10 := 1
        call Preset______incr__
      end if
      set_control_par_str(%btn_ks_selector[$note_number0], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !midi_note_names[$note_number0 + ($keyswitch_octave * 12)])
      set_control_par(%btn_ks_selector[$note_number0], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, 31)
      set_control_par(%btn_ks_selector[$note_number0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    end if
    set_control_par(%btn_ks_selector[$note_number0], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, $ret24)
    $ret24 := $ret24 + (get_control_par(%btn_ks_selector[$note_number0], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) + 2)
    inc($note_number0)
  end while
end function
function Floatmask____set
  %Bitlist____val[%_Floatmask____fm[($_ret440 * 2) + ($_iter50 / 32)]] := (%Bitlist____val[%_Floatmask____fm[($_ret440 * 2) + ($_iter50 / 32)]] .and. .not. sh_left(1, (31 - $_iter50) mod 32)) .or. sh_left($_iter60, (31 - $_iter50) mod 32)
end function
function Floatmask______init__
  $Floatmask____free_idx := search(%Floatmask____allocation, 0)
  if($Floatmask____free_idx = -1)
    message("Error: No more free space available to allocate objects of type 'Floatmask'")
  end if
  %Floatmask____allocation[$Floatmask____free_idx] := 1
  $_short_circuit30 := %_Floatmask____fm[$Floatmask____free_idx * 2]
  $_ret560 := 1
  $articulation_id2 := $_short_circuit30
  while($articulation_id2 # -1) 
    $ret17 := 0
    %Bitlist____allocation[$articulation_id2] := %Bitlist____allocation[$articulation_id2] - $_ret560
    if(%Bitlist____allocation[$articulation_id2] > 0)
      $articulation_id2 := -1
      continue
    else
      %Bitlist____allocation[$articulation_id2] := 0
    end if
    $_short_circuit30 := $articulation_id2
    $articulation_id2 := -1
    $articulation_event_is_empty0 := $_short_circuit30
    $all_inactive0 := 0
    if($articulation_event_is_empty0 # -1)
      %Bitlist____val[$articulation_event_is_empty0] := 0
    end if
  end while
  $Bitlist____free_idx := search(%Bitlist____allocation, 0)
  if($Bitlist____free_idx = -1)
    message("Error: No more free space available to allocate objects of type 'Bitlist'")
  end if
  %Bitlist____allocation[$Bitlist____free_idx] := 1
  %Bitlist____val[$Bitlist____free_idx] := 0
  $result2 := $Bitlist____free_idx
  %_Floatmask____fm[$Floatmask____free_idx * 2] := $result2
  $result1 := %_Floatmask____fm[$Floatmask____free_idx * 2]
  $idx18 := 1
  if($result1 # -1)
    %Bitlist____allocation[$result1] := %Bitlist____allocation[$result1] + $idx18
  end if
  $_short_circuit30 := %_Floatmask____fm[($Floatmask____free_idx * 2) + 1]
  $_ret560 := 1
  $articulation_id2 := $_short_circuit30
  while($articulation_id2 # -1) 
    $ret17 := 0
    %Bitlist____allocation[$articulation_id2] := %Bitlist____allocation[$articulation_id2] - $_ret560
    if(%Bitlist____allocation[$articulation_id2] > 0)
      $articulation_id2 := -1
      continue
    else
      %Bitlist____allocation[$articulation_id2] := 0
    end if
    $_short_circuit30 := $articulation_id2
    $articulation_id2 := -1
    $articulation_event_is_empty0 := $_short_circuit30
    $all_inactive0 := 0
    if($articulation_event_is_empty0 # -1)
      %Bitlist____val[$articulation_event_is_empty0] := 0
    end if
  end while
  $Bitlist____free_idx := search(%Bitlist____allocation, 0)
  if($Bitlist____free_idx = -1)
    message("Error: No more free space available to allocate objects of type 'Bitlist'")
  end if
  %Bitlist____allocation[$Bitlist____free_idx] := 1
  %Bitlist____val[$Bitlist____free_idx] := 0
  $result2 := $Bitlist____free_idx
  %_Floatmask____fm[($Floatmask____free_idx * 2) + 1] := $result2
  $result1 := %_Floatmask____fm[($Floatmask____free_idx * 2) + 1]
  $idx18 := 1
  if($result1 # -1)
    %Bitlist____allocation[$result1] := %Bitlist____allocation[$result1] + $idx18
  end if
  $ks4 := $Floatmask____free_idx
end function
function Floatmask____get_range
  $reduced_note0000 := 0
  call Floatmask______init__

function Scrollarea__update_scroll_handle
  $note12 := 2
  $keyswitch10 := ((%Browser____num_shown_presets[$note11] + 9) - 1) / 9
  $instrument_slot1 := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
  if($keyswitch10 > 2)
    $instrument_slot1 := (get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) * $note12) / $keyswitch10
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scrollhandle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $instrument_slot1)
  if($instrument_slot1 < get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scrollhandle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + ((get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - $instrument_slot1) - ((get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * (get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - $instrument_slot1)) / 1000000)))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scrollhandle), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scrollhandle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scrollhandle), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  end if
end function
function Scrollarea__repaint

function Scrollarea__update_position

end function

  $trigger_clear0100 := $is_active0100

    $trigger_clear0100 := $_ret28000
  else
    if($_ret28000 > $i29100)
      $trigger_clear0100 := ($_ret28000 - 2) + 1
    end if
  end if
  $i280100 := ((%Browser____num_shown_presets[$i3100] + 9) - 1) / 9
  $idx34 := 0
  if($i280100 > 2)
    $idx34 := $i280100 - 2
  end if
  $trigger_clear0100 := ($trigger_clear0100 * (1 + (sh_right($idx34 - $trigger_clear0100, 31) .or. sh_right($trigger_clear0100, 31)))) - ($idx34 * sh_right($idx34 - $trigger_clear0100, 31))

  $event1 := $i3100
  $string0101 := $is_free100
  call Scrollarea__update_position
end function

    if((sh_right(%Bitlist____val[%_Floatmask____fm[(%Categories____tagmask[$result000] * 2) + ($seed00 / 32)]], (31 - $seed00) mod 32) .and. 1) = 1)
      $i280000 := 0
      while($i280000 < num_elements(%BrowserFont__types)) 
        set_control_par(%btn_tags[$seed00], %BrowserFont__types[$i280000], %BrowserFont__tag[$i280000])
        inc($i280000)
      end while
    else
      $allow_repetitions01 := %BrowserFont__tag[6]
      $rr11 := 0
      while($rr11 < num_elements(%BrowserFont__types)) 
        set_control_par(%btn_tags[$seed00], %BrowserFont__types[$rr11], $allow_repetitions01)
        inc($rr11)
      end while
    end if
    if($seed00 = 15)
      set_control_par_str(%btn_tags[$seed00], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, !Categories__favorite_tag_pictures[sh_right(%Bitlist____val[%_Floatmask____fm[(%Categories____tagmask[$result000] * 2) + ($seed00 / 32)]], (31 - $seed00) mod 32) .and. 1])
    else
      if($seed00 = %Categories____user_tag[$result000])
        set_control_par_str(%btn_tags[$seed00], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, !Categories__user_tag_pictures[sh_right(%Bitlist____val[%_Floatmask____fm[(%Categories____tagmask[$result000] * 2) + ($seed00 / 32)]], (31 - $seed00) mod 32) .and. 1])
      else
        set_control_par_str(%btn_tags[$seed00], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_category")
      end if
    end if
    inc($seed00)
  end while
  $fade_out_end000 := $any_event_active1
  $i3100 := $browser
  $is_free100 := search(%_Browser____filtered_presets, %Browser____current[$browser], $browser * 1499, ($browser * 1499) + 1498)
  call Scrollarea__focus
  $instrument1 := $browser
  call PresetStrip__update_strip
end function
function set_background_animation
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_bg_upper), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $i280000)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_bg_lower), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $i280000)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_label_cover), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $i280000)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_bg_upper), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $i280000)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_bg_lower), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $i280000)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_browser_bg_upper), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $i280000)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_browser_bg_lower), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $i280000)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_browser_overlay), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $i280000)
end function
function update_all_ranges
  $group_count001 := 128
  $highest1 := 0
  $group_count000 := 0
  while($group_count000 <= 0) 
    $iii2 := $group_count000
    $i10 := 128
    $_ret9100 := 0
    $i41 := 0
    $ii7 := 0
    while($ii7 <= 7) 
      if(%_keyswitch_states[($iii2 * 8) + $ii7] = 1)
        $i41 := 0
        while($i41 <= 3) 
          if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)] >= 0)
            if((%subarticulations_range_lower[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)]]] * 12)) < $i10)
              $i10 := %subarticulations_range_lower[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)]]] * 12)
            end if
            if((%subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)]]] * 12)) > $_ret9100)
              $_ret9100 := %subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)]]] * 12)
            end if
          end if
          inc($i41)
        end while
      end if
      inc($ii7)
    end while
    %_instrument_range[$iii2 * 2] := ($i10 - $range_offset_lower) - (%octave_shift[$iii2] * 12)
    %_instrument_range[($iii2 * 2) + 1] := ($_ret9100 + $range_offset_upper) - (%octave_shift[$iii2] * 12)
    $group_count001 := $group_count001 - (($group_count001 - %_instrument_range[$group_count000 * 2]) .and. sh_right(%_instrument_range[$group_count000 * 2] - $group_count001, 31))
    $highest1 := $highest1 - (($highest1 - %_instrument_range[($group_count000 * 2) + 1]) .and. sh_right($highest1 - %_instrument_range[($group_count000 * 2) + 1], 31))
    inc($group_count000)
  end while
  %nki_range[0] := $group_count001 - (($group_count001 - ((($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8) - 1)) .and. sh_right($group_count001 - ((($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8) - 1), 31))
  %nki_range[1] := $highest1
  $string0101 := 0
  while($string0101 <= 127) 
    set_key_color($string0101, $KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE)
    if(($string0101 >= %nki_range[0]) and ($string0101 <= %nki_range[1]))
      set_key_color($string0101, $KEY_COLOR_BLUE)
    end if
    inc($string0101)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 7) 
    set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_RED)
    if(%_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $i] = 1)
      set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_ORANGE)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function articulation_update_minimal_delay
  %_articulation_minimal_delay[($next_free_idx1 * 8) + $idx35] := 0
  $i31 := 0
  while($i31 <= 3) 
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($next_free_idx1 * 32) + (($idx35 * 4) + $i31)] # -1)
      if(%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($next_free_idx1 * 32) + (($idx35 * 4) + $i31)]]] = 2)
        %_articulation_minimal_delay[($next_free_idx1 * 8) + $idx35] := %_articulation_minimal_delay[($next_free_idx1 * 8) + $idx35] - ((%_articulation_minimal_delay[($next_free_idx1 * 8) + $idx35] - $lookahead) .and. sh_right(%_articulation_minimal_delay[($next_free_idx1 * 8) + $idx35] - $lookahead, 31))
      else
        %_articulation_minimal_delay[($next_free_idx1 * 8) + $idx35] := %_articulation_minimal_delay[($next_free_idx1 * 8) + $idx35] - ((%_articulation_minimal_delay[($next_free_idx1 * 8) + $idx35] - %subarticulations_start_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($next_free_idx1 * 32) + (($idx35 * 4) + $i31)]]]) .and. sh_right(%_articulation_minimal_delay[($next_free_idx1 * 8) + $idx35] - %subarticulations_start_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($next_free_idx1 * 32) + (($idx35 * 4) + $i31)]]], 31))
      end if
    end if
    inc($i31)
  end while
end function
function update_minimal_delays
  $_ret280 := 0
  $is_free1 := 0
  while($is_free1 <= 0) 
    $_ret280 := 0
    while($_ret280 <= 7) 
      $next_free_idx1 := $is_free1
      $idx35 := $_ret280
      call articulation_update_minimal_delay
      inc($_ret280)
    end while
    inc($is_free1)
  end while
end function
function choose_mode
  $use_constant_delay := $string0101
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_choose_mode), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $string0101)
  if($use_constant_delay = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_choose_mode_live), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[0])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_choose_mode_lookahead), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[1])
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_choose_mode_live), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[1])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_choose_mode_lookahead), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[0])
  end if
end function
function update_instrument_selector_menu
  $string0101 := 0
  while($string0101 <= 0) 
    set_menu_item_str($mnu_instrument_selector, $string0101, !instrument_name[%loaded_instrument_types[$string0101]])
    inc($string0101)
  end while
end function
function set_modulation_position
  %modulation_positions[$result3] := $articulation_id0
end function
function update_keyswitch_selection
  $result10 := 0
  while($result10 < 8) 
    set_control_par(%swi_keyswitch[$result10], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $result10])
    set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch_note_name[$result10], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !midi_note_names[$result10 + ($keyswitch_octave * 12)])
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_note_name[$result10], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[(6 * abs(sh_right(abs(%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $result10]) - 1, 31))) + (%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $result10] * %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $result10])])
    set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch[$result10], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "          ")
    set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch[$result10], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXTLINE, "          ")
    set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch[$result10], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXTLINE, !_articulation_names[($selected_instrument * 8) + $result10])
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch[$result10], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[(6 * abs(sh_right(abs(%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $result10]) - 1, 31))) + (%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $result10] * %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $result10])])
    $ii6 := $result10
    set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch_icon[$ii6], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, !articulation_icon_states[(2 * abs(sh_right(abs(%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $ii6]) - 1, 31))) + (%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $ii6] * %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $ii6])])
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_icon[$ii6], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %_articulation_icon[($selected_instrument * 8) + $ii6])
    set_control_par(%swi_keyswitch_purge[$result10], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $result10])
    set_key_pressed(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $result10, %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $result10] * abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($nki_type - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)))
    inc($result10)
  end while
  $group_count001 := 128
  $highest1 := 0
  $group_count000 := 0
  while($group_count000 <= 0) 
    $iii2 := $group_count000
    $i10 := 128
    $_ret9100 := 0
    $i41 := 0
    $ii7 := 0
    while($ii7 <= 7) 
      if(%_keyswitch_states[($iii2 * 8) + $ii7] = 1)
        $i41 := 0
        while($i41 <= 3) 
          if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)] >= 0)
            if((%subarticulations_range_lower[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)]]] * 12)) < $i10)
              $i10 := %subarticulations_range_lower[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)]]] * 12)
            end if
            if((%subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)]]] * 12)) > $_ret9100)
              $_ret9100 := %subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($iii2 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $i41)]]] * 12)
            end if
          end if
          inc($i41)
        end while
      end if
      inc($ii7)
    end while
    %_instrument_range[$iii2 * 2] := ($i10 - $range_offset_lower) - (%octave_shift[$iii2] * 12)
    %_instrument_range[($iii2 * 2) + 1] := ($_ret9100 + $range_offset_upper) - (%octave_shift[$iii2] * 12)
    $group_count001 := $group_count001 - (($group_count001 - %_instrument_range[$group_count000 * 2]) .and. sh_right(%_instrument_range[$group_count000 * 2] - $group_count001, 31))
    $highest1 := $highest1 - (($highest1 - %_instrument_range[($group_count000 * 2) + 1]) .and. sh_right($highest1 - %_instrument_range[($group_count000 * 2) + 1], 31))
    inc($group_count000)
  end while
  %nki_range[0] := $group_count001 - (($group_count001 - ((($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8) - 1)) .and. sh_right($group_count001 - ((($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8) - 1), 31))
  %nki_range[1] := $highest1
  $string0101 := 0
  while($string0101 <= 127) 
    set_key_color($string0101, $KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE)
    if(($string0101 >= %nki_range[0]) and ($string0101 <= %nki_range[1]))
      set_key_color($string0101, $KEY_COLOR_BLUE)
    end if
    inc($string0101)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 7) 
    set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_RED)
    if(%_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $i] = 1)
      set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_ORANGE)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  $selected_subarticulation := 0
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    if($nki_type # 0)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_bg_upper), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "bg_upper_editor")
    end if
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_velocity_to_modwheel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_mw_to_velocity[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_humanize), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_humanization[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
    if(%_articulation_release[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] >= 0)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_release[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_articulation_release_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_regular")
      $btn_articulation_release := 0
    else
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Release")
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_articulation_release_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_regular_disabled")
      $btn_articulation_release := 1
    end if
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] * -1)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope) - 1)) 
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(round(real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) + (real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.) - int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) * pow(real($i) / real(num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope)), (real(%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 100.) + 1.)))))
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - get_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
      inc($i)
    end while
    if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 5) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 40))
      $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 0
    else
      if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 40))
        $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 1
      else
        if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 5) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
          $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 2
        else
          if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
            $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 3
          else
            if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
              $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 4
            else
              $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 5
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    $countdown0 := $selected_subarticulation
    $time1 := 0
    while($time1 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
      if($time1 # $countdown0)
        set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$time1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$time1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      end if
      inc($time1)
    end while
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
      $displayed_subarticulation := $selected_subarticulation
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] # -1)
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "    " & !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]])
      else
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "    Empty")
      end if
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_solo_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_solo_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mute_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_mute_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_layer_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $selected_subarticulation)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_volume[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_layer_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 4)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_editor_overview) - 1)) 
        if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)] # -1)
          set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "         " & !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]]])
          set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[0])
        else
          set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "         Empty")
          set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[6])
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_repetition_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_repetition_speed_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_rr_mode), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_rr_mode_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
      if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 0) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 5))
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_tightness[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_rr_mode_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if

      end if

        end if
      end if
    end if
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 3) 
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)

        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        if($i = $selected_subarticulation)
          set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
          set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

        $result000 := %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
        $seed00 := int(round((real($result001) / 127.) * real(31 + (sh_right($result001 - 32, 31) + 1))))
        $_ret870 := int((real($result000) / 127.) * 31.)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %center_circles_frame_sums[$seed00] + $_ret870)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $result001)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $result000)
      end if
      inc($i)

    if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
      ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.

    ?xy_dynamic_range[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.

    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
    $any_event_active1 := %modulation_positions[0]
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_cursor), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 3) + int((real((($any_event_active1 * (1 + (sh_right(127 - $any_event_active1, 31) .or. sh_right($any_event_active1 - 1, 31)))) - sh_right($any_event_active1 - 1, 31)) - (127 * sh_right(127 - $any_event_active1, 31))) / 127.) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))))
