end function
function cc_on_controller
  $i34 := 0
  $e0 := 0
  $modulation2 := 0
  $level2 := 0
  $smoothed_modulation0 := 0
  $smoothed_level0 := 0
  ~weight0 := 0.
  $repeat0 := 0
  if($mnu_cc_smoothing = 1)
    ~weight0 := 0.1
  else
    if($mnu_cc_smoothing = 2)
      ~weight0 := 0.05
    end if
  end if
  $repeat0 := 0
  $_iter70 := 0
  $_iter60 := 0
  $_iter50 := 0
  while($_iter50 <= 0) 
    $_iter60 := 0
    while($_iter60 <= 7) 
      $_iter70 := 0
      while($_iter70 <= 127) 
        if(%_event_list[($_iter50 * 1024) + (($_iter60 * 128) + $_iter70)] >= 0)
          $i34 := 0
          while($i34 <= 3) 
            $output_type0 := %_event_list[($_iter50 * 1024) + (($_iter60 * 128) + $_iter70)]
            $event0 := $i34
            call articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id
            $_ret440 := $instrument2
            if($_ret440 >= 0)
              if(($note_number0 = -1) or (%subarticulation_event_note[%_event_list[($_iter50 * 1024) + (($_iter60 * 128) + $_iter70)]] = $note_number0))
                $output_type0 := %_event_list[($_iter50 * 1024) + (($_iter60 * 128) + $_iter70)]
                $event0 := $i34
                call articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id
                $result51 := $instrument2
                $ii7 := %subarticulation_event_subarticulation[$result51]
                call subarticulation_reacts_to_modwheel
                $result52 := $i41
                if($result52 = 1)
                  $modulation2 := int((1000000. * (real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[(%articulation_event_instrument[%_event_list[($_iter50 * 1024) + (($_iter60 * 128) + $_iter70)]] * 32) + ((%articulation_event_keyswitch[%_event_list[($_iter50 * 1024) + (($_iter60 * 128) + $_iter70)]] * 4) + $i34)]) + ((real(%modulation_positions[0]) / 127.) * real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[(%articulation_event_instrument[%_event_list[($_iter50 * 1024) + (($_iter60 * 128) + $_iter70)]] * 32) + ((%articulation_event_keyswitch[%_event_list[($_iter50 * 1024) + (($_iter60 * 128) + $_iter70)]] * 4) + $i34)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[(%articulation_event_instrument[%_event_list[($_iter50 * 1024) + (($_iter60 * 128) + $_iter70)]] * 32) + ((%articulation_event_keyswitch[%_event_list[($_iter50 * 1024) + (($_iter60 * 128) + $_iter70)]] * 4) + $i34)])))) / 127.)
                  $result50 := %articulation_event_instrument[%_event_list[($_iter50 * 1024) + (($_iter60 * 128) + $_iter70)]]
                  $i2803 := %articulation_event_keyswitch[%_event_list[($_iter50 * 1024) + (($_iter60 * 128) + $_iter70)]]
                  $trigger_clear02 := %articulation_event_note[%_event_list[($_iter50 * 1024) + (($_iter60 * 128) + $_iter70)]]
                  $i292 := $i34
                  call articulations_compute_level
                  $level2 := $result41
                  $output_type0 := %_event_list[($_iter50 * 1024) + (($_iter60 * 128) + $_iter70)]
                  $event0 := $i34
                  call articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id
                  $result70 := $instrument2
                  if(((abs(%subarticulation_event_modulation[$result70] - $modulation2) > 10000) and ($mnu_cc_smoothing > 0)) and ($use_smoothing0 = 1))
                    $output_type0 := %_event_list[($_iter50 * 1024) + (($_iter60 * 128) + $_iter70)]
                    $event0 := $i34
                    call articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id
                    $fade_in_range000 := $instrument2
                    $output_type0 := %_event_list[($_iter50 * 1024) + (($_iter60 * 128) + $_iter70)]
                    $event0 := $i34
                    call articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id
                    $fade_out_end000 := $instrument2
                    $smoothed_modulation0 := int(real(%subarticulation_event_modulation[$fade_in_range000]) + (~weight0 * (real($modulation2) - real(%subarticulation_event_modulation[$fade_out_end000]))))
                    if($smoothed_modulation0 # $modulation2)
                      $repeat0 := 1
                    end if
                  else
                    $smoothed_modulation0 := $modulation2
                  end if
                  $output_type0 := %_event_list[($_iter50 * 1024) + (($_iter60 * 128) + $_iter70)]
                  $event0 := $i34
                  call articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id
                  $result70 := $instrument2
                  if(((abs(%subarticulation_event_level[$result70] - $level2) > 1000) and ($mnu_cc_smoothing > 0)) and ($use_smoothing0 = 1))
                    $output_type0 := %_event_list[($_iter50 * 1024) + (($_iter60 * 128) + $_iter70)]
                    $event0 := $i34
                    call articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id
                    $fade_in_range000 := $instrument2
                    $output_type0 := %_event_list[($_iter50 * 1024) + (($_iter60 * 128) + $_iter70)]
                    $event0 := $i34
                    call articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id
                    $fade_out_end000 := $instrument2
                    $smoothed_level0 := int(real(%subarticulation_event_level[$fade_in_range000]) + (~weight0 * (real($level2) - real(%subarticulation_event_level[$fade_out_end000]))))
                    if($smoothed_level0 # $level2)
                      $repeat0 := 1
                    end if
                  else
                    $smoothed_level0 := $level2
                  end if
                  message("smoothed_level: " & $smoothed_level0 & ", level: " & $level2 & ", e: " & %_event_list[($_iter50 * 1024) + (($_iter60 * 128) + $_iter70)])
                  $output_type0 := %_event_list[($_iter50 * 1024) + (($_iter60 * 128) + $_iter70)]
                  $event0 := $i34
                  call articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id
                  $result70 := $instrument2
                  $s00 := $result70
                  $group_count000 := $smoothed_modulation0
                  call subarticulation_set_modulation
                  $output_type0 := %_event_list[($_iter50 * 1024) + (($_iter60 * 128) + $_iter70)]
                  $event0 := $i34
                  call articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id
                  $result70 := $instrument2
                  $group_count001 := $result70
                  $level0 := $smoothed_level0
                  call subarticulation_set_level
                end if
              end if
            end if
            inc($i34)
          end while
        end if
        inc($_iter70)
      end while
      inc($_iter60)
    end while
    inc($_iter50)
  end while
  $ret24 := $repeat0
end function
function get_next_rr
  $is_free100 := 0
  $i3100 := 0
  if(%subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($trigger_clear0100 * 32) + (($i29100 * 4) + $is_active0100)]]] = 0)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[($trigger_clear0100 * 32) + (($i29100 * 4) + $is_active0100)] = 0)
      $is_free100 := (%_rr_data_idx[($trigger_clear0100 * 4096) + (($i29100 * 512) + (($is_active0100 * 128) + $_ret28000))] + 1) mod %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($trigger_clear0100 * 32) + (($i29100 * 4) + $is_active0100)]]]
    else
      $is_free100 := random(0, %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($trigger_clear0100 * 32) + (($i29100 * 4) + $is_active0100)]]] - 1)
    end if
  else
    if(($ENGINE_UPTIME - %_rr_data_time[($trigger_clear0100 * 4096) + (($i29100 * 512) + (($is_active0100 * 128) + $_ret28000))]) > %subarticulations_rrr_reset_time[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($trigger_clear0100 * 32) + (($i29100 * 4) + $is_active0100)]]])
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[($trigger_clear0100 * 32) + (($i29100 * 4) + $is_active0100)] = 0)
        $is_free100 := (%_rr_data_idx[($trigger_clear0100 * 4096) + (($i29100 * 512) + (($is_active0100 * 128) + $_ret28000))] + 1) mod %subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($trigger_clear0100 * 32) + (($i29100 * 4) + $is_active0100)]]]
      else
        $is_free100 := random(0, %subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($trigger_clear0100 * 32) + (($i29100 * 4) + $is_active0100)]]] - 1)
        $i3100 := 1
      end if
    else
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[($trigger_clear0100 * 32) + (($i29100 * 4) + $is_active0100)] = 0)
        $is_free100 := %subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($trigger_clear0100 * 32) + (($i29100 * 4) + $is_active0100)]]] - ((%subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($trigger_clear0100 * 32) + (($i29100 * 4) + $is_active0100)]]] - ((%_rr_data_idx[($trigger_clear0100 * 4096) + (($i29100 * 512) + (($is_active0100 * 128) + $_ret28000))] + 1) mod %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($trigger_clear0100 * 32) + (($i29100 * 4) + $is_active0100)]]])) .and. sh_right(%subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($trigger_clear0100 * 32) + (($i29100 * 4) + $is_active0100)]]] - ((%_rr_data_idx[($trigger_clear0100 * 4096) + (($i29100 * 512) + (($is_active0100 * 128) + $_ret28000))] + 1) mod %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($trigger_clear0100 * 32) + (($i29100 * 4) + $is_active0100)]]]), 31))
      else
        $is_free100 := random(%subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($trigger_clear0100 * 32) + (($i29100 * 4) + $is_active0100)]]], %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($trigger_clear0100 * 32) + (($i29100 * 4) + $is_active0100)]]] - 1)
      end if
    end if
    %_rr_data_time[($trigger_clear0100 * 4096) + (($i29100 * 512) + (($is_active0100 * 128) + $_ret28000))] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
  end if
  if(($is_free100 = %_rr_data_idx[($trigger_clear0100 * 4096) + (($i29100 * 512) + (($is_active0100 * 128) + $_ret28000))]) and ($i3100 = 0))
    $is_free100 := ($is_free100 + 1) mod %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($trigger_clear0100 * 32) + (($i29100 * 4) + $is_active0100)]]]
  end if
  %_rr_data_idx[($trigger_clear0100 * 4096) + (($i29100 * 512) + (($is_active0100 * 128) + $_ret28000))] := $is_free100
  $i280100 := $is_free100
end function
function subarticulation_event_get_free_index
  $highest1 := -1
  $lowest00 := 0
  while(($lowest00 < 256) and ($lowest00 >= 0)) 
    $lowest00 := search(%subarticulation_event_list, -1, $lowest00, 256)
    if($lowest00 >= 0)
      if(%subarticulation_event_last_used[$lowest00] < ($ENGINE_UPTIME - $lookahead))
        $highest1 := $lowest00
        $lowest00 := 256
      end if
      inc($lowest00)
    end if
  end while
  $highest00 := $highest1
end function
function redirect_output_ensemble
  if($nki_type = 0)
    redirect_output($event0, $output_type0, $instrument2)
  end if
end function
function subarticulation_event_set_event_id
  %subarticulation_event_list[$group_count001] := $group_count000
end function
function subarticulation_event_fade_out
  if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_list[$subarticulation_event_id16] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
    fade_out(%subarticulation_event_list[$subarticulation_event_id16], $fade_time1 * 1000, $stop_voice0)
    if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$subarticulation_event_id16] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
      fade_out(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$subarticulation_event_id16], $fade_time1 * 1000, $stop_voice0)
    end if
    if(%subarticulation_event_transition_event_id[$subarticulation_event_id16] # -1)
      fade_out(%subarticulation_event_transition_event_id[$subarticulation_event_id16], $fade_time1 * 1000, $stop_voice0)
    end if
    if(%subarticulation_event_transition_octave_event_id[$subarticulation_event_id16] # -1)
      fade_out(%subarticulation_event_transition_octave_event_id[$subarticulation_event_id16], $fade_time1 * 1000, $stop_voice0)
    end if
    if($stop_voice0 = 1)
      $group_count001 := $subarticulation_event_id16
      $group_count000 := -1
      call subarticulation_event_set_event_id
    end if
  end if
end function
function subarticulation_octave_layer_set_event_id
  %subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$s00] := $ks00
end function
function subarticulation_event_set_event_mark
  if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_list[$subarticulation_event_id14] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
    set_event_mark(%subarticulation_event_list[$subarticulation_event_id14], $mark1)
    if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$subarticulation_event_id14] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
      set_event_mark(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$subarticulation_event_id14], $mark1)
    end if
  end if
end function
function subarticulation_event_disallow_groups
  $highest1 := $subarticulation_event_id1
  $lowest00 := $EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP
  $highest00 := 0
  $ks00 := $ALL_GROUPS
  call subarticulation_event_set_event_par_arr
end function
function subarticulation_event_allow_groups
  $highest1 := $subarticulation_event_id0
  $lowest00 := $EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP
  $highest00 := 1
  $ks00 := $group0
  call subarticulation_event_set_event_par_arr
end function
function subarticulation_event_change_vol
  if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_list[$subarticulation_event_id17] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
    change_vol(%subarticulation_event_list[$subarticulation_event_id17], $volume0, $relative_bit0)
    if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$subarticulation_event_id17] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
      change_vol(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$subarticulation_event_id17], $volume0, $relative_bit0)
    end if
  end if
end function
function subarticulation_event_fade_in
  if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_list[$subarticulation_event_id15] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
    fade_in(%subarticulation_event_list[$subarticulation_event_id15], $fade_time0 * 1000)
    if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$subarticulation_event_id15] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
      fade_in(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$subarticulation_event_id15], $fade_time0 * 1000)
    end if
    if(%subarticulation_event_transition_event_id[$subarticulation_event_id15] # -1)
      fade_in(%subarticulation_event_transition_event_id[$subarticulation_event_id15], $fade_time0 * 1000)
    end if
    if(%subarticulation_event_transition_octave_event_id[$subarticulation_event_id15] # -1)
      fade_in(%subarticulation_event_transition_octave_event_id[$subarticulation_event_id15], $fade_time0 * 1000)
    end if
  end if
end function
function repetition_engine_add
  $transition0 := search(%repetition_engine_subarticulation_events, -1)
  if($transition0 # -1)
    %repetition_engine_subarticulation_events[$transition0] := $layer0
    $repetition_engine_active := 1
    if($repetition_engine_start_time = -1)
      $repetition_engine_start_time := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    end if
    $repetition_engine_highest_idx := $repetition_engine_highest_idx - (($repetition_engine_highest_idx - $transition0) .and. sh_right($repetition_engine_highest_idx - $transition0, 31))
  else
    message("REACHED MAX_SUBARTICULATIONS_IN_REPETITION_ENGINE")
  end if
end function
function update_authoring_labels
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_sustain_release), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, $sli_sustain_release & " + " & $sli_sustain_release_offset & " ms")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_trans_start), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, $sli_trans_start & " + " & $sli_trans_start_offset & " ms")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_trans_fadeIn), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, int((real($sli_trans_fadeIn) / 1000000.) * 750.) & " + " & int((real($sli_trans_fadeIn_offset) / 1000000.) * 750.) & " ms")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, (round((real($sli_trans_volume) / 1000.) * pow(10., 2.)) / pow(10., 2.)) & " + " & (round((real($sli_trans_volume_offset) / 1000.) * pow(10., 2.)) / pow(10., 2.)) & " dB")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_trans_fadeOut), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, int((real($sli_trans_fadeOut) / 1000000.) * 1000.) & " + " & int((real($sli_trans_fadeOut_offset) / 1000000.) * 1000.) & " ms")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_sustain_wait), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, int((real($sli_sustain_wait) / 1000000.) * 500.) & " + " & int((real($sli_sustain_wait_offset) / 1000000.) * 500.) & " ms")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_sustain_fadeIn), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, int((real($sli_sustain_fadeIn) / 1000000.) * 500.) & " + " & int((real($sli_sustain_fadeIn_offset) / 1000000.) * 500.) & " ms")
end function

    set_control_par(get_ui_id($vlue_authoring_start_note), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $ret21)

    set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $instrument1)
    if(abs($ret21 - $i280000) <= 12)
      $authoring_interval_valid := 1
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_release), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_sus_release_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($ret21 * 25) + (abs($i280000 - $ret21) + (- sh_right(- ($i280000 - $ret21), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_start), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_zone_start[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($ret21 * 25) + (abs($i280000 - $ret21) + (- sh_right(- ($i280000 - $ret21), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_fadeIn), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($ret21 * 25) + (abs($i280000 - $ret21) + (- sh_right(- ($i280000 - $ret21), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($ret21 * 25) + (abs($i280000 - $ret21) + (- sh_right(- ($i280000 - $ret21), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_fadeOut), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($ret21 * 25) + (abs($i280000 - $ret21) + (- sh_right(- ($i280000 - $ret21), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_wait), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_sus_wait_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($ret21 * 25) + (abs($i280000 - $ret21) + (- sh_right(- ($i280000 - $ret21), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_fadeIn), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($ret21 * 25) + (abs($i280000 - $ret21) + (- sh_right(- ($i280000 - $ret21), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_release_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_sus_release_time_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($ret21 * 25) + (abs($i280000 - $ret21) + (- sh_right(- ($i280000 - $ret21), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_start_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_zone_start_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($ret21 * 25) + (abs($i280000 - $ret21) + (- sh_right(- ($i280000 - $ret21), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_fadeIn_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($ret21 * 25) + (abs($i280000 - $ret21) + (- sh_right(- ($i280000 - $ret21), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_volume_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($ret21 * 25) + (abs($i280000 - $ret21) + (- sh_right(- ($i280000 - $ret21), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_fadeOut_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($ret21 * 25) + (abs($i280000 - $ret21) + (- sh_right(- ($i280000 - $ret21), 31) * 12)))])

    else

    end if
    if($authoring_interval_valid = 1)

end function
function last_transitions_update
  $i35 := 0
  while($i35 <= (num_elements(%_last_transitions) - 1)) 
    if(%_last_transitions[$i35] # -1)
      if(%_last_transitions_timecode[$i35] < ($ENGINE_UPTIME - 2000))
        %_last_transitions[$i35] := -1
      end if
    end if
    inc($i35)
  end while
end function
function last_transitions_contains
  $result9 := 0
  call last_transitions_update
  $i36 := 0
  while($i36 <= 7) 
    if(%_last_transitions[($instrument3 * 256) + (($keyswitch2 * 32) + (($subarticulation_idx2 * 8) + $i36))] = ((128 * $transition_type0) + $note4))
      $result9 := 1
      %_last_transitions[($instrument3 * 256) + (($keyswitch2 * 32) + (($subarticulation_idx2 * 8) + $i36))] := -1
    end if
    inc($i36)
  end while
  $ret31 := $result9
end function
function last_transitions_add_event
  $iii2 := -1
  $min5 := %_last_transitions_timecode[($_ret9100 * 256) + (($ii7 * 32) + ($i41 * 8))]
  $min_idx0 := 0
  $i37 := 0
  if($i10 >= 0)
    $i37 := 0
    while($i37 <= 7) 
      if(%_last_transitions[($_ret9100 * 256) + (($ii7 * 32) + (($i41 * 8) + $i37))] = -1)
        $iii2 := $i37
        if($min5 > %_last_transitions_timecode[($_ret9100 * 256) + (($ii7 * 32) + (($i41 * 8) + $i37))])
          $min5 := %_last_transitions_timecode[($_ret9100 * 256) + (($ii7 * 32) + (($i41 * 8) + $i37))]
          $min_idx0 := $i37
        end if
      end if
      inc($i37)
    end while
    if($iii2 # -1)
      %_last_transitions[($_ret9100 * 256) + (($ii7 * 32) + (($i41 * 8) + $iii2))] := (128 * $i10) + $level0
      %_last_transitions_timecode[($_ret9100 * 256) + (($ii7 * 32) + (($i41 * 8) + $iii2))] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    else
      %_last_transitions[($_ret9100 * 256) + (($ii7 * 32) + (($i41 * 8) + $min_idx0))] := (128 * $i10) + $level0
      %_last_transitions_timecode[($_ret9100 * 256) + (($ii7 * 32) + (($i41 * 8) + $min_idx0))] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    end if
  end if
end function
function repetition_engine_remove
  $note1 := search(%repetition_engine_subarticulation_events, $result6)
  if($note1 # -1)
    %repetition_engine_subarticulation_events[$note1] := -1
  end if
end function
function subarticulation_note_off
  if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_list[$subarticulation_event_id8] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
    message("release subart " & $subarticulation_event_id8)
    $subarticulation_id4 := %subarticulation_event_subarticulation[$subarticulation_event_id8]
    $result6 := $subarticulation_event_id8
    call repetition_engine_remove
    if(((%subarticulations_release_time[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] = 0) or (($ENGINE_UPTIME - %last_pressed[%subarticulation_event_note[$subarticulation_event_id8]]) < %subarticulations_release_time[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]])) or (%_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[(%articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id8]] * 32) + ((%articulation_event_keyswitch[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id8]] * 4) + %subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[$subarticulation_event_id8])] > 0))
      $idx390 := %_articulation_release[(%articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id8]] * 8) + %articulation_event_keyswitch[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id8]]]
      if($idx390 >= 0)
        $subarticulation_event_id16 := $subarticulation_event_id8
        $fade_time1 := $idx390
        $stop_voice0 := 1
        call subarticulation_event_fade_out
      else
        if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] = 2) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] = 9))
          $idx390 := 300
          $subarticulation_event_id16 := $subarticulation_event_id8
          $fade_time1 := 300
          $stop_voice0 := 1
          call subarticulation_event_fade_out
        else
          note_off(%subarticulation_event_list[$subarticulation_event_id8])
          if(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$subarticulation_event_id8] # -1)
            note_off(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$subarticulation_event_id8])
          end if
        end if
      end if
      if((%subarticulations_release_group[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] = 1) and (($authoring_page_active = 0) or ($btn_play_sustain = 1)))
        $event2 := play_note(%subarticulation_event_actual_note[$subarticulation_event_id8], %key_velocity[%subarticulation_event_note[$subarticulation_event_id8]], 0, 0)
        $event0 := $event2
        $output_type0 := $OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT
        $instrument2 := %articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id8]]
        call redirect_output_ensemble
        $octave_event0 := -1
        if(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer[$subarticulation_event_id8] # 0)
          $octave_event0 := play_note(%subarticulation_event_actual_note[$subarticulation_event_id8] + 12, %key_velocity[%subarticulation_event_note[$subarticulation_event_id8]], 0, 0)
          $event0 := $octave_event0
          $output_type0 := $OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT
          $instrument2 := %articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id8]]
          call redirect_output_ensemble
        end if
        $group_count001 := $subarticulation_event_id8
        $group_count000 := $event2
        call subarticulation_event_set_event_id
        $s00 := $subarticulation_event_id8
        $ks00 := $octave_event0
        call subarticulation_octave_layer_set_event_id
        $subarticulation_event_id1 := $subarticulation_event_id8
        call subarticulation_event_disallow_groups
        $ii3 := 0
        $i38 := 0
        while($i38 <= (%subarticulations_dynamic_layers[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] - 1)) 
          $ii3 := 0
          while($ii3 <= 5) 
            if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] # 2) and (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] # 9))
              $subarticulation_event_id0 := $subarticulation_event_id8
              $group0 := (((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] + 1) + (((6 * %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]]) * %subarticulations_dynamic_layers[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]]) * (%subarticulation_event_interval[$subarticulation_event_id8] * 2))) + ((($i38 * (%subarticulations_release_group[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] + 1)) + 1) * 6)) + $ii3
              call subarticulation_event_allow_groups
            else
              $subarticulation_event_id0 := $subarticulation_event_id8
              $group0 := (((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] + 1) + (6 * ((%subarticulations_dynamic_layers[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] * 2) + %subarticulations_trans_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]]))) + ($i38 * 6)) + $ii3
              call subarticulation_event_allow_groups
            end if
            inc($ii3)
          end while
          inc($i38)
        end while
        $s00 := $subarticulation_event_id8
        $group_count000 := %subarticulation_event_modulation[$subarticulation_event_id8]
        call subarticulation_set_modulation
        $group_count001 := $subarticulation_event_id8
        $level0 := %subarticulation_event_level[$subarticulation_event_id8]
        call subarticulation_set_level
        $subarticulation_event_id17 := $subarticulation_event_id8
        $volume0 := %_loaded_subarticulations_volume[(%articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id8]] * 32) + ((%articulation_event_keyswitch[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id8]] * 4) + %subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[$subarticulation_event_id8])] * 1000
        $relative_bit0 := 1
        call subarticulation_event_change_vol
        if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] = 2) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id4]] = 9))
          $ii7 := %articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id8]]
          $iii2 := %subarticulation_event_note[$subarticulation_event_id8]
          call note_to_string
          $_ret780 := $i41
          %_release_per_string[(%articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id8]] * 10) + ($_ret780 * 2)] := $event2
          $ii7 := %articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id8]]
          $iii2 := %subarticulation_event_note[$subarticulation_event_id8]
          call note_to_string
          $reduced_note00 := $i41
          %_release_per_string[(%articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id8]] * 10) + (($reduced_note00 * 2) + 1)] := $octave_event0
        end if
      end if
    end if
    $group_count001 := $subarticulation_event_id8
    $group_count000 := -1
    call subarticulation_event_set_event_id
    $s00 := $subarticulation_event_id8
    $ks00 := -1

  end if

  %subarticulation_event_actual_note[$subarticulation_event_id8] := -1

  %subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[$subarticulation_event_id8] := -1
end function

function delay_buffer_execute
  $i39 := 0
  $ii5 := 0
  $articulation_event_is_empty0 := 0
  $all_inactive0 := 1
  if($any_delay_event_queued = 1)
    $i39 := 0
    while($i39 <= $delay_buffer_highest_idx) 
      if(%delay_buffer[$i39] # -1)
        %delay_buffer_countdown[$i39] := %delay_buffer_countdown[$i39] - 5
        if(%delay_buffer_countdown[$i39] <= 0)
          if(%delay_buffer_velo[$i39] >= 0)
            $_short_circuit30 := 0
            $output_type0 := %delay_buffer[$i39]
            $event0 := %delay_buffer_subarticulation[$i39]
            call articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id
            $_ret560 := $instrument2
            if($_ret560 < 0)
              $_short_circuit30 := 1
            else
              if(%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[(%delay_buffer_instrument[$i39] * 32) + ((%delay_buffer_keyswitch[$i39] * 4) + %delay_buffer_subarticulation[$i39])]]] = 9)
                $_short_circuit30 := 1
              end if
            end if
            if($_short_circuit30 = 1)
              $result53 := 0
              $trigger_clear0100 := %delay_buffer_instrument[$i39]
              $i29100 := %delay_buffer_keyswitch[$i39]

              $modulation1 := int((1000000. * (real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[(%delay_buffer_instrument[$i39] * 32) + ((%delay_buffer_keyswitch[$i39] * 4) + %delay_buffer_subarticulation[$i39])]) + ((real(%modulation_positions[0]) / 127.) * real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[(%delay_buffer_instrument[$i39] * 32) + ((%delay_buffer_keyswitch[$i39] * 4) + %delay_buffer_subarticulation[$i39])] - %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[(%delay_buffer_instrument[$i39] * 32) + ((%delay_buffer_keyswitch[$i39] * 4) + %delay_buffer_subarticulation[$i39])])))) / 127.)
              $level1 := $rr10
              $transpose0 := %octave_shift[%delay_buffer_instrument[$i39]] * 12

              $result53 := $ret29

            else

            end if
          else

            if($_short_circuit30 >= 0)

        $all_inactive0 := 0

        end if
      end if
      inc($i39)
    end while
    if($all_inactive0 = 1)
      $any_delay_event_queued := 0
    end if
  end if
end function
function repetition_engine_update_tempo
  ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 := real(ms_to_ticks(60000000)) / 960.
  if((~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 # ~tempo) or ($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_LISTENER))
    $transition0 := 0
    $layer0 := 0
    $result6 := 0
    while($result6 <= 0) 
      $transition0 := 0
      while($transition0 <= 7) 
        $layer0 := 0
        while($layer0 <= 3) 
          if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($result6 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)] >= 0)
            if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($result6 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)]]] = 0) and (%_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($result6 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)] > 0))
              %_repetition_interval_time[($result6 * 4096) + (($transition0 * 512) + $layer0)] := int((60000. / ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0) * (4. / real(%_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($result6 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)])))
            end if
          end if
          inc($layer0)
        end while
        inc($transition0)
      end while
      inc($result6)
    end while
    ~tempo := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0
  end if
end function
function repetition_engine_listener
  $any_event_played0 := 0
  $any_event_active0 := 0
  if($repetition_engine_active = 1)
    $i := 0
    while(($i < num_elements(%repetition_played_subarticulation_events)) and (%repetition_played_subarticulation_events[$i] # -1)) 
      %repetition_played_subarticulation_events[$i] := -1
      inc($i)
    end while
    $i := 0
    while($i <= $repetition_engine_highest_idx) 
      $event3 := %repetition_engine_subarticulation_events[$i]
      if($event3 # -1)
        $any_event_active0 := 1
        if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_list[$event3] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
          $inst1 := %articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$event3]]
          $ks6 := %articulation_event_keyswitch[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$event3]]
          $timing0 := %_repetition_interval_time[($inst1 * 4096) + (($ks6 * 512) + %subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[$event3])]
          if(((((($ENGINE_UPTIME + %_repetition_interval_time_humanization[($inst1 * 4096) + (($ks6 * 512) + %subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[$event3])]) - $repetition_engine_start_time) mod $timing0) < 5) and ((($ENGINE_UPTIME - %subarticulation_event_last_used[$event3]) > ((($timing0 - %_articulation_humanization[($inst1 * 8) + $ks6]) - 5) - ($lookahead * $use_constant_delay))) or in_range($ENGINE_UPTIME - %pressed_keys[%subarticulation_event_note[$event3]], 5 + ($lookahead * $use_constant_delay), (5 + $timing0) + ($lookahead * $use_constant_delay)))) and ((%_pressed_notes_per_instrument[($inst1 * 128) + %subarticulation_event_note[$event3]] >= 0) or ($sustain_pedal = 1)))
            $any_event_played0 := 1
            %repetition_played_subarticulation_events[search(%repetition_played_subarticulation_events, -1)] := $event3
            $id2 := 0
            $trigger_clear0100 := $inst1
            $i29100 := $ks6
            $is_active0100 := %subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[$event3]
            $_ret28000 := %subarticulation_event_note[$event3]
            call get_next_rr
            $_ret860 := $i280100
            $instrument5 := $inst1
            $keyswitch4 := $ks6
            $subarticulation_idx4 := %subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[$event3]
            $subarticulation_id1 := %subarticulation_event_subarticulation[$event3]
            $note6 := %subarticulation_event_note[$event3]
            $velocity0 := 1 - ((1 - ((int((127. * (real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($inst1 * 32) + (($ks6 * 4) + %subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[$event3])]) + ((real(%modulation_positions[0]) / 127.) * real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($inst1 * 32) + (($ks6 * 4) + %subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[$event3])] - %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($inst1 * 32) + (($ks6 * 4) + %subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[$event3])])))) / 127.) * - sh_right($timing0 - ($ENGINE_UPTIME - %pressed_keys[%subarticulation_event_note[$event3]]), 31)) + (%key_velocity[%subarticulation_event_note[$event3]] * (1 + sh_right($timing0 - ($ENGINE_UPTIME - %pressed_keys[%subarticulation_event_note[$event3]]), 31))))) .and. sh_right(1 - ((int((127. * (real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($inst1 * 32) + (($ks6 * 4) + %subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[$event3])]) + ((real(%modulation_positions[0]) / 127.) * real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($inst1 * 32) + (($ks6 * 4) + %subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[$event3])] - %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($inst1 * 32) + (($ks6 * 4) + %subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[$event3])])))) / 127.) * - sh_right($timing0 - ($ENGINE_UPTIME - %pressed_keys[%subarticulation_event_note[$event3]]), 31)) + (%key_velocity[%subarticulation_event_note[$event3]] * (1 + sh_right($timing0 - ($ENGINE_UPTIME - %pressed_keys[%subarticulation_event_note[$event3]]), 31)))), 31))
            $interval0 := %subarticulation_event_interval[$event3]
            $rr0 := $_ret860
            $modulation1 := %subarticulation_event_modulation[$event3]
            $level1 := %subarticulation_event_level[$event3]
            $transpose0 := %octave_shift[$inst1] * 12
            $octave_layer0 := %octave_layer[$inst1]
            $previous_note0 := $event3
            call subarticulation_play_note
            $id2 := $ret29
            ~_ret6000 := ~_ret600
            $_ret78001 := $_ret7800
            $i350 := %subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$event3]
            $i36 := %subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[$event3]
            $result9 := $id2
            call articulation_event_set_subarticulation_event_id
            %subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$id2] := %subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$event3]
            $allow_repetitions01 := $event3
            $result6 := $allow_repetitions01
            call repetition_engine_remove
            $subarticulation_event_id16 := $allow_repetitions01
            $fade_time1 := 100
            $stop_voice0 := 1
            call subarticulation_event_fade_out
          end if
        else
          $inst1 := $event3
          $result6 := $inst1
          call repetition_engine_remove
          dec($repetition_engine_highest_idx)
        end if
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    if($any_event_played0 = 1)
      call repetition_engine_update_tempo
      $i := 0
      while(($i < num_elements(%repetition_played_subarticulation_events)) and (%repetition_played_subarticulation_events[$i] # -1)) 
        %_repetition_interval_time_humanization[(%articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[%repetition_played_subarticulation_events[$i]]] * 4096) + ((%articulation_event_keyswitch[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[%repetition_played_subarticulation_events[$i]]] * 512) + %subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[%repetition_played_subarticulation_events[$i]])] := random(- %_articulation_humanization[(%articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[%repetition_played_subarticulation_events[$i]]] * 8) + %articulation_event_keyswitch[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[%repetition_played_subarticulation_events[$i]]]] / 2, %_articulation_humanization[(%articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[%repetition_played_subarticulation_events[$i]]] * 8) + %articulation_event_keyswitch[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[%repetition_played_subarticulation_events[$i]]]] / 2)
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
    if($any_event_active0 = 0)
      $repetition_engine_active := 0
      $repetition_engine_start_time := -1
    end if
  end if
end function
function murmation_rng
  $layer0 := 0
  $countdown0 := $NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING
  $i280000 := $NI_SONG_POSITION / 25
  $instrument1 := random(0, 10000000)
  call switch
  $layer0 := $time1
  $layer0 := (8088405 * $layer0) + 1
  $note1 := ((sh_right($layer0, 8) .and. 16777215) mod (($transition0 - $result6) + 1)) + $result6
end function
function murmation_engine_listener
  if($any_murmation_active = 1)
    $murmation_listener_counter := ($murmation_listener_counter + 1) mod 5
    if($murmation_listener_counter = 0)
      $step_time0 := 0
      $play_time0 := $ENGINE_UPTIME - $murmation_start_time
      $chance0 := 100
      $ii6 := 0
      $iii1 := 0
      $any_event_active1 := 0
      $any_murmation_active := 0
      $i40 := 0
      while($i40 <= 0) 
        $ii6 := 0
        while($ii6 <= 7) 
          $iii1 := 0
          while($iii1 <= 3) 
            if(%_murmation_active[($i40 * 32) + (($ii6 * 4) + $iii1)] = 1)
              $any_murmation_active := 1
              if(%_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($i40 * 32) + (($ii6 * 4) + $iii1)] = 0)
                $step_time0 := 250
                $chance0 := 50
              else
                $step_time0 := (($DURATION_QUARTER * 4) / %_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($i40 * 32) + (($ii6 * 4) + $iii1)]) / 1000
                while($step_time0 < 250) 
                  $step_time0 := $step_time0 * 2
                end while
              end if
              if(($play_time0 mod $step_time0) < 25)
                if(%active_notes[$i40] = 0)
                  %_murmation_active[($i40 * 32) + (($ii6 * 4) + $iii1)] := 0
                end if
                $any_event_active1 := 1
                $result6 := 0
                $transition0 := 100
                call murmation_rng
                $_ret870 := $note1
                if($_ret870 <= $chance0)
                  $seed00 := 0
                  $result6 := 0
                  $transition0 := %active_notes[$i40] - 1
                  call murmation_rng
                  $seed00 := $note1
                  $result000 := -1
                  $result001 := 0
                  while($seed00 >= 0) 
                    $result000 := search(%_pressed_notes_per_instrument, 1, (($i40 * 128) + $result000) + 1, ($i40 * 128) + 128) mod 128
                    dec($seed00)
                  end while
                  $result001 := $result000
                  $_short_circuit40 := 0
                  if($result001 # %articulation_event_note[%_current_murmation_event[($i40 * 32) + (($ii6 * 4) + $iii1)]])
                    $instrument_slot2 := $i40
                    $keyswitch11 := $ii6
                    $note13 := $result001
                    call event_list_get_articulation_event
                    $_ret880 := $ret19
                    if(%_current_murmation_event[($i40 * 32) + (($ii6 * 4) + $iii1)] # $_ret880)
                      $_short_circuit40 := 1
                    end if
                  end if
                  if($_short_circuit40 = 1)
                    $result42 := (($lookahead * $use_constant_delay) - %subarticulations_start_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i40 * 32) + (($ii6 * 4) + $iii1)]]]) + random(- %_articulation_humanization[($i40 * 8) + $ii6] / 2, %_articulation_humanization[($i40 * 8) + $ii6] / 2)
                    if(%_current_murmation_event[($i40 * 32) + (($ii6 * 4) + $iii1)] # -1)
                      if(abs(%articulation_event_note[%_current_murmation_event[($i40 * 32) + (($ii6 * 4) + $iii1)]] - $result001) <= %subarticulations_interval_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i40 * 32) + (($ii6 * 4) + $iii1)]]])
                        $instrument1 := $i40
                        $keyswitch1 := $ii6
                        $subarticulation_idx1 := $iii1
                        $note1 := $result001
                        $layer0 := 0
                        $transition0 := abs(%articulation_event_note[%_current_murmation_event[($i40 * 32) + (($ii6 * 4) + $iii1)]] - $result001) + (- sh_right(- (%articulation_event_note[%_current_murmation_event[($i40 * 32) + (($ii6 * 4) + $iii1)]] - $result001), 31) * 12)
                        ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 := 1. - (real(($ENGINE_UPTIME - %articulation_event_timestamp[%_current_murmation_event[($i40 * 32) + (($ii6 * 4) + $iii1)]]) - ((($ENGINE_UPTIME - %articulation_event_timestamp[%_current_murmation_event[($i40 * 32) + (($ii6 * 4) + $iii1)]]) - 500) .and. sh_right(500 - ($ENGINE_UPTIME - %articulation_event_timestamp[%_current_murmation_event[($i40 * 32) + (($ii6 * 4) + $iii1)]]), 31))) / 500.)
                        $result6 := -1
                        if(((((($instrument1 >= 0) and ($instrument1 < 1)) and ($subarticulation_idx1 >= 0)) and ($subarticulation_idx1 < 4)) and ($note1 >= 0)) and ($note1 < 128))
                          if(($transition0 >= 0) and ($transition0 < 25))
                            $result6 := %_legato_data_trans_zone_start[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($layer0 * 3200) + (($note1 * 25) + $transition0))))] + int(~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 * real(%_legato_data_trans_zone_start_offset[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($layer0 * 3200) + (($note1 * 25) + $transition0))))]))
                          else
                            if($transition0 = -1)
                              $result6 := %_legato_data_trans_zone_start[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + ($layer0 * 3200)))] + int(~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 * real(%_legato_data_trans_zone_start_offset[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + ($layer0 * 3200)))]))
                            end if
                          end if
                        end if
                        $ret21 := $result6
                        $_ret890 := $ret21
                        $result42 := $result42 - (200 - $_ret890)
                      end if
                    end if
                    $instrument_slot2 := $i40
                    $keyswitch11 := $ii6
                    $note13 := $result001
                    call event_list_get_articulation_event
                    $result60 := $ret19
                    $articulation_id1 := $result60
                    $instrument7 := $i40
                    $keyswitch5 := $ii6
                    $subarticulation2 := $iii1
                    $note9 := $result001
                    $velo0 := 100
                    $interval1 := 0
                    $time1 := $ENGINE_UPTIME
                    $countdown0 := 25 - ((25 - $result42) .and. sh_right(25 - $result42, 31))
                    $previous_note1 := %_current_murmation_event[($i40 * 32) + (($ii6 * 4) + $iii1)]
                    call delay_buffer_add
                    $instrument_slot2 := $i40
                    $keyswitch11 := $ii6
                    $note13 := $result001
                    call event_list_get_articulation_event
                    %_current_murmation_event[($i40 * 32) + (($ii6 * 4) + $iii1)] := $ret19
                  end if
                end if
              end if
            end if
            inc($iii1)
          end while
          inc($ii6)
        end while
        inc($i40)
      end while
      if($any_murmation_active = 0)
        $murmation_start_time := -1
        $murmation_highest_rate := 1
      end if
    end if
  end if
end function
function update_dynamic_range_cursor
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_cursor), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 3) + int((real((($any_event_active1 * (1 + (sh_right(127 - $any_event_active1, 31) .or. sh_right($any_event_active1 - 1, 31)))) - sh_right($any_event_active1 - 1, 31)) - (127 * sh_right(127 - $any_event_active1, 31))) / 127.) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))))
end function
function update_circle_modwheel_position
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_center_circle_indicator), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $_ret870)
end function
function update_modwheel_assignment_cursor
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_cursor), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 2) + int(real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) * (real($transition0) / 127.)))
end function
function update_keyswitch_volume_curve_cursor
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_cursor), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 2) + int(real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) * (real($layer0) / 127.)))
end function
function editor_update_modwheel_position
  $any_event_active1 := $iii1
  call update_dynamic_range_cursor
  $_ret870 := $iii1
  call update_circle_modwheel_position
  $transition0 := $iii1
  call update_modwheel_assignment_cursor
  $layer0 := $iii1
  call update_keyswitch_volume_curve_cursor
end function
function update_articulation_icon
  set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch_icon[$ii6], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, !articulation_icon_states[(2 * abs(sh_right(abs(%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $ii6]) - 1, 31))) + (%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $ii6] * %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $ii6])])
  set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_icon[$ii6], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %_articulation_icon[($selected_instrument * 8) + $ii6])
end function
function subarticulation_group_count
  $stop_voice0 := 0
  if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_event_id15]] = 2) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_event_id15]] = 9))
    $stop_voice0 := 6 * ((%subarticulations_dynamic_layers[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_event_id15]] * 3) + %subarticulations_trans_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_event_id15]])
  else
    $stop_voice0 := (6 * %subarticulations_interval_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_event_id15]]) * ((%subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_event_id15]] * %subarticulations_dynamic_layers[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_event_id15]]) * (1 + %subarticulations_release_group[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_event_id15]]))
  end if
  $fade_time0 := $stop_voice0
end function
function PresetBrowser__show
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($PresetBrowser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$transition0])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_main_buttons), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs((- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($PresetBrowser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31) .or. - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_credits), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)) .or. - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_browser_return), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($PresetBrowser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_settings_return), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_credits_return), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_credits), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)])
end function
function ks_articulation_browser_open
  $transition0 := 1
  call PresetBrowser__show
end function
function display_value_in_control_label
  !label0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  %idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  if($active_label_displays_ignore = 0)
    !label0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_control_par_str(%uiid3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT)
    %idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%active_label_displays, %uiid3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    if(%idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] = -1)
      %idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%active_label_displays, -1)
      %active_label_displays[%idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %uiid3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      !active_label_displays_texts[%idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := !label0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      message("set " & !label0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end if
    %active_label_displays_cb_ids[%idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
    set_control_par_str(%uiid3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & " " & !unit0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    wait(1200000)
    if($NI_CALLBACK_ID = %active_label_displays_cb_ids[%idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
      set_control_par_str(%uiid3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !active_label_displays_texts[%idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
      %active_label_displays[%idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := -1
    end if
  end if
end function
function update_mixer_channels
  $instrument1 := 0
  while($instrument1 < 5) 
    $i280000 := %microphone_position_states[$instrument1]
    if($instrument1 >= 4)
      $i280000 := %microphone_position_states[$instrument1 + $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel]
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_channel_bleed_channel_off), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[abs(sh_right(abs($i280000) - 1, 31)) * 6])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_channel_bleed_channel_on), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[$i280000])
    end if
    $interval1 := abs(sh_right(abs($i280000) - 1, 31))
    set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_disable_input[$instrument1], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$interval1])
    set_control_par(%lbl_mixer_channel_name[$instrument1], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_large_white[$i280000])
    set_control_par(%lbl_mixer_channel_out[$instrument1], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[$i280000])
    set_control_par(%lbl_mixer_channel_rev_send[$instrument1], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[$i280000])
    set_control_par_str(%sli_mixer_channel_pan[$instrument1], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_slider_pan" & !Utils__disabled_assets[1 - $i280000])
    set_control_par_str(%sli_mixer_channel_volume[$instrument1], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_slider_mixer" & !Utils__disabled_assets[1 - $i280000])
    set_control_par_str(%sli_mixer_channel_rev_send[$instrument1], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[1 - $i280000])
    inc($instrument1)
  end while
end function
function update_solo_selection
  $instrument1 := 0
  $i280000 := 0
  while($i280000 <= 4) 
    if(get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[$i280000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
      $instrument1 := 1
    end if
    inc($i280000)
  end while
  if($instrument1 = 1)
    $i280000 := 0
    while($i280000 <= 4) 
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 396851 * get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[$i280000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 5, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + $i280000)
      inc($i280000)
    end while
  else
    $i280000 := 0
    while($i280000 <= 4) 
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 396851 * abs(sh_right(abs(get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[$i280000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) - 1, 31)), -1, 5, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + $i280000)
      inc($i280000)
    end while
  end if
end function
function subarticulation_browser_load_category
  $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
  $selected_category := $e0
  $i34 := 0
  while($i34 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
    if($i34 = $e0)
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$i34], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    else
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$i34], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    end if
    inc($i34)
  end while
  $use_smoothing0 := 0
  $i34 := 0
  while($i34 <= 31) 
    if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($e0 * 32) + $i34)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      $use_smoothing0 := $i34
    end if
    if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($e0 * 32) + $i34)] = -1)
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $i34
      $i34 := 32
    end if
    inc($i34)
  end while
  if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    $use_smoothing0 := 0
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
    $use_smoothing0 := $use_smoothing0 - (($use_smoothing0 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $use_smoothing0, 31))
  end if
  $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $e0
  message("loaded_subarticulations: " & %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
  $result1 := $use_smoothing0
  $note_selection0 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
  $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($note_selection0 - (($result1 * $note_selection0) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($note_selection0 - (($result1 * $note_selection0) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($note_selection0 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $note_selection0))
  $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($note_selection0 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $note_selection0
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
      set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  end if
end function
function subarticulation_browser_close
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_ks_browse")
end function
function move_legato_buffer_to_instrument
  $subarticulation_idx1 := 0
  $keyswitch1 := 0
  $instrument1 := 0
  $note1 := 0
  while($note1 <= 1) 
    $subarticulation_idx1 := 0
    while($subarticulation_idx1 <= 127) 
      $keyswitch1 := 0
      while($keyswitch1 <= 24) 
        %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time[($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_sus_release_time[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time[($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_sus_wait_time[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time[($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time[($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time[($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_zone_start[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start[($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume[($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time_offset[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time_offset[($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_sus_release_time_offset[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time_offset[($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_sus_wait_time_offset[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time_offset[($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time_offset[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time_offset[($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time_offset[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time_offset[($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_zone_start_offset[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start_offset[($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume_offset[($result6 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume_offset[($note1 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        inc($keyswitch1)
      end while
      inc($subarticulation_idx1)
    end while
    inc($note1)
  end while
  $instrument1 := 0
  while($instrument1 <= 127) 
    %_legato_data_all_transitions_volume_curve[($result6 * 4096) + (($transition0 * 512) + (($layer0 * 128) + $instrument1))] := %legato_data_buffer_all_transitions_volume_curve[$instrument1]
    inc($instrument1)
  end while
end function
function load_kontakt_effects
  %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  while(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 4) 
    wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_SOLID_GEQ, -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]))
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEQ_LF_FREQ, 10000, -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEQ_LF_GAIN, 150000, -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEQ_LMF_FREQ, 500000, -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEQ_LMF_GAIN, 150000, -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEQ_HF_FREQ, 500000, -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEQ_HF_GAIN, 400000, -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 440000, -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_STEREO, -1, 5, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]))
    wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_GAINER, -1, 6, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]))
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_DRY_LEVEL, 0, -1, 6, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_SEND_LEVELS, -1, 7, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]))
    inc(%i44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end while
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0, 0, -1, 7, $NI_INSERT_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_1, 0, -1, 7, $NI_INSERT_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_2, 0, -1, 7, $NI_INSERT_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_3, 0, -1, 7, $NI_INSERT_BUS)
  wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_RAUM, -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS))
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DECAY, 400000, -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_LOWSHELF, 500000, -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_FILTER, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS))
  wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_SUBTYPE, $FILTER_TYPE_EQ2BAND, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS))
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_FREQ1, 365608, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_BW1, 480000, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN1, 530000, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_FREQ2, 761517, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_BW2, 122000, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN2, 471000, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_FILTER, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS))
  wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_SUBTYPE, $FILTER_TYPE_EQ3BAND, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS))
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_FREQ1, 209396, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_BW1, 500000, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN1, 500000, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_FREQ2, 609890, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_BW2, 500000, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN2, 500000, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_FREQ3, 943843, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_BW3, 500000, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN3, 500000, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_SUPERGT, -1, 2, $NI_MAIN_BUS))
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SUPERGT_COMPRESS, 0, -1, 2, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SUPERGT_ATTACK, 250000, -1, 2, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SUPERGT_RELEASE, 700000, -1, 2, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
end function
function editor_page_close
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_ks_browse")
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
end function
function mixer_page_close
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_mixer_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
end function
function show_keyswitches
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_keyswitches), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$result001])
end function
function authoring_close
  $btn_show_authoring_tools := 0
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_authoring), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  $authoring_page_active := 0
end function
function main_page_close
  call authoring_close
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_main_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
end function
function update_mixer_eq
  $btn_mixer_eq_disable_input := $btn_mixer_eq_title
  $interval1 := abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_eq_title) - 1, 31))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_eq_disable_input), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$interval1])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_low), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_eq_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_mid), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_eq_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_high), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_eq_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_eq_low), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %BrowserFont__button[$btn_mixer_eq_title])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_eq_mid), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %BrowserFont__button[$btn_mixer_eq_title])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_eq_high), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %BrowserFont__button[$btn_mixer_eq_title])
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS, abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_eq_title) - 1, 31)), -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN1, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_low), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN2, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_mid), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN3, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_high), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
end function
function update_mixer_comp
  $btn_mixer_comp_disable_input := $btn_mixer_comp_title
  $interval1 := abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_comp_title) - 1, 31))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_comp_disable_input), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$interval1])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_compression), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_comp_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_mix), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_comp_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_comp_compression), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %BrowserFont__button[$btn_mixer_comp_title])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_comp_mix), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %BrowserFont__button[$btn_mixer_comp_title])
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS, abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_comp_title) - 1, 31)), -1, 2, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SUPERGT_COMPRESS, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_compression), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 2, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SUPERGT_MIX, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_mix), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 2, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
end function
function update_mixer_rev
  $btn_mixer_rev_disable_input := $btn_mixer_rev_title
  $interval1 := abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_rev_title) - 1, 31))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_rev_disable_input), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$interval1])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_rev_return), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_rev_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_mixer_rev_preset), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %BrowserFont__button[$btn_mixer_rev_title])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_rev_return), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %BrowserFont__button[$btn_mixer_rev_title])
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_BYPASS, abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_rev_title) - 1, 31)), -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_rev_return), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
end function
function mixer_page_open
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_mixer_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  $btn_mixer_eq_title := abs(sh_right(abs(get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)) - 1, 31))
  $btn_mixer_comp_title := abs(sh_right(abs(get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS, -1, 2, $NI_MAIN_BUS)) - 1, 31))
  $btn_mixer_rev_title := abs(sh_right(abs(get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_BYPASS, -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)) - 1, 31))
  call update_mixer_eq
  call update_mixer_comp
  call update_mixer_rev
end function
function ks_articulation_browser_close
  $transition0 := 0
  call PresetBrowser__show
end function
function update_main_buttons_display
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_main_buttons), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs((- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($PresetBrowser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31) .or. - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_credits), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)) .or. - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_browser_return), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($PresetBrowser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_settings_return), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_credits_return), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_credits), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)])
end function
function settings_close
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  call update_main_buttons_display
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
end function
function credits_close
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_credits), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  call update_main_buttons_display
  $btn_sonu_logo := 0
end function
function credits_open
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_credits), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  call update_main_buttons_display
  call settings_close
  $btn_sonu_logo := 1
end function
function settings_open
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  call update_main_buttons_display
  call credits_close
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
end function
function toggle_con_sordino
  $iii2 := 0
  while($iii2 <= 4) 
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS, abs(sh_right(abs($i10) - 1, 31)), -1, 0, $iii2 + $NI_BUS_OFFSET)
    message("Con Sordino: " & $i10 & " for channel " & $iii2)
    inc($iii2)
  end while
end function
function move_to_legato_buffer
  $layer0 := 0
  $transition0 := 0
  $result6 := 0
  $note1 := 0
  while($note1 <= 1) 
    $layer0 := 0
    while($layer0 <= 127) 
      $transition0 := 0
      while($transition0 <= 24) 
        %_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time[($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time[($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_release_time[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time[($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_wait_time[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time[($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time[($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start[($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_zone_start[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume[($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
