        %_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time_offset[($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time_offset[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time_offset[($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_release_time_offset[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time_offset[($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_wait_time_offset[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time_offset[($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time_offset[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time_offset[($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time_offset[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start_offset[($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_zone_start_offset[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume_offset[($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume_offset[($instrument1 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 6400) + (($note1 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        inc($transition0)
      end while
      inc($layer0)
    end while
    inc($note1)
  end while
  $result6 := 0
  while($result6 <= 127) 
    %legato_data_buffer_all_transitions_volume_curve[$result6] := %_legato_data_all_transitions_volume_curve[($instrument1 * 4096) + (($keyswitch1 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx1 * 128) + $result6))]
    inc($result6)
  end while
end function
function find_loaded_legato
  $authoring_page_active := 0
  if(%_loaded_subarticulations[0] # -1)
    if(%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[0]]] = 2)
      $authoring_page_active := 1
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_authoring_legato_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[0]]] & " (" & %_loaded_subarticulations[0] & ")")
    end if
  end if
end function
function authoring_open
  call find_loaded_legato
  $ret21 := 60
  $i280000 := 60
  $instrument1 := 0
  call update_authoring_transition
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_authoring), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  $i28020 := 0
  while($i28020 <= 127) 
    %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[$i28020] := %_legato_data_all_transitions_volume_curve[$i28020]
    inc($i28020)
  end while
end function
function keyswitch_name_edit_show
  @txt_keyswitch_name := !_articulation_names[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_keyswitch_name_edit), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$iii1])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_name), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs($iii1) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_name_edit), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $iii1)
end function
function set_current_articulation_name
  !_articulation_names[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := @g_name00
end function
function update_keyswitch_volume_curve
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] * -1)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(round(real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) + (real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.) - int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) * pow(real($i) / real(num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope)), (real(%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 100.) + 1.)))))
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - get_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function update_subarticulation_selection
  $countdown0 := $selected_subarticulation
  $time1 := 0
  while($time1 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
    if($time1 # $countdown0)
      set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$time1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    else
      set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$time1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    end if
    inc($time1)
  end while
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  end if
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    $displayed_subarticulation := $selected_subarticulation
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] # -1)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "    " & !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]])
    else
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "    Empty")
    end if
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_solo_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_solo_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mute_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_mute_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_layer_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $selected_subarticulation)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_volume[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_layer_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 4)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_editor_overview) - 1)) 
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)] # -1)
        set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "         " & !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]]])
        set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[0])
      else
        set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "         Empty")
        set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[6])
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_repetition_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_repetition_speed_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_rr_mode), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_rr_mode_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 0) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 5))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_tightness[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      $mnu_subarticulation_rr_mode := %_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_rr_mode), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_rr_mode_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    if(((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 0) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 5)) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 9))
      $mnu_subarticulation_repetition_speed := %_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_repetition_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_repetition_speed_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 2) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 9))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_volume[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      $btn_subarticulation_trans_speed := %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed_auto[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      if($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed = 1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
    end if
  end if
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 3) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)] # -1)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      if($i = $selected_subarticulation)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      $result001 := %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $result000 := %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $seed00 := int(round((real($result001) / 127.) * real(31 + (sh_right($result001 - 32, 31) + 1))))
      $_ret870 := int((real($result000) / 127.) * 31.)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %center_circles_frame_sums[$seed00] + $_ret870)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $result001)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $result000)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] + %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0]) * 225.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 225)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
  end if
  ?xy_dynamic_range[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
  ?xy_dynamic_range[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[0] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  $any_event_active1 := %modulation_positions[0]
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_cursor), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 3) + int((real((($any_event_active1 * (1 + (sh_right(127 - $any_event_active1, 31) .or. sh_right($any_event_active1 - 1, 31)))) - sh_right($any_event_active1 - 1, 31)) - (127 * sh_right(127 - $any_event_active1, 31))) / 127.) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))))
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_back")
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
    if($selected_subarticulation < 0)
      $selected_subarticulation := 0
      $btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all := 0
      $countdown0 := 0
      $time1 := 0
      while($time1 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
        if($time1 # $countdown0)
          set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$time1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$time1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        end if
        inc($time1)
      end while
    end if
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] # -1)
      $e0 := %type_to_category[%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]]]
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
      $selected_category := $e0
      $i34 := 0
      while($i34 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
        if($i34 = $e0)
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$i34], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$i34], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        end if
        inc($i34)
      end while
      $use_smoothing0 := 0
      $i34 := 0
      while($i34 <= 31) 
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($e0 * 32) + $i34)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
          $use_smoothing0 := $i34
        end if
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($e0 * 32) + $i34)] = -1)
          $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $i34
          $i34 := 32
        end if
        inc($i34)
      end while
      if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        $use_smoothing0 := 0
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
        $use_smoothing0 := $use_smoothing0 - (($use_smoothing0 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $use_smoothing0, 31))
      end if
      $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $e0
      message("loaded_subarticulations: " & %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      $result1 := $use_smoothing0
      $note_selection0 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
      $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($note_selection0 - (($result1 * $note_selection0) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($note_selection0 - (($result1 * $note_selection0) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($note_selection0 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $note_selection0))
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($note_selection0 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $note_selection0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
          set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
          else
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          end if
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
    else
      $e0 := 0
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
      $selected_category := 0
      $i34 := 0
      while($i34 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
        if($i34 = $e0)
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$i34], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$i34], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        end if
        inc($i34)
      end while
      $use_smoothing0 := 0
      $i34 := 0
      while($i34 <= 31) 
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($e0 * 32) + $i34)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
          $use_smoothing0 := $i34
        end if
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($e0 * 32) + $i34)] = -1)
          $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $i34
          $i34 := 32
        end if
        inc($i34)
      end while
      if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        $use_smoothing0 := 0
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
        $use_smoothing0 := $use_smoothing0 - (($use_smoothing0 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $use_smoothing0, 31))
      end if
      $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $e0
      message("loaded_subarticulations: " & %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      $result1 := $use_smoothing0
      $note_selection0 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
      $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($note_selection0 - (($result1 * $note_selection0) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($note_selection0 - (($result1 * $note_selection0) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($note_selection0 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $note_selection0))
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($note_selection0 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $note_selection0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
          set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
          else
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          end if
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
    end if
  end if
end function
function subarticulation_browser_open
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_back")
  $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
  if($selected_subarticulation < 0)
    $selected_subarticulation := 0
    $btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all := 0
    $countdown0 := 0
    $time1 := 0
    while($time1 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
      if($time1 # $countdown0)
        set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$time1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$time1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      end if
      inc($time1)
    end while
  end if
  if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] # -1)
    $e0 := %type_to_category[%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]]]
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
    $selected_category := $e0
    $i34 := 0
    while($i34 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
      if($i34 = $e0)
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$i34], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$i34], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
      inc($i34)
    end while
    $use_smoothing0 := 0
    $i34 := 0
    while($i34 <= 31) 
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($e0 * 32) + $i34)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
        $use_smoothing0 := $i34
      end if
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($e0 * 32) + $i34)] = -1)
        $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $i34
        $i34 := 32
      end if
      inc($i34)
    end while
    if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      $use_smoothing0 := 0
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
      $use_smoothing0 := $use_smoothing0 - (($use_smoothing0 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $use_smoothing0, 31))
    end if
    $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $e0
    message("loaded_subarticulations: " & %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
    $result1 := $use_smoothing0
    $note_selection0 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
    $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($note_selection0 - (($result1 * $note_selection0) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($note_selection0 - (($result1 * $note_selection0) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($note_selection0 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $note_selection0))
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($note_selection0 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $note_selection0
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
        set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        end if
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    end if
  else
    $e0 := 0
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
    $selected_category := 0
    $i34 := 0
    while($i34 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
      if($i34 = $e0)
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$i34], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$i34], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
      inc($i34)
    end while
    $use_smoothing0 := 0
    $i34 := 0
    while($i34 <= 31) 
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($e0 * 32) + $i34)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
        $use_smoothing0 := $i34
      end if
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($e0 * 32) + $i34)] = -1)
        $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $i34
        $i34 := 32
      end if
      inc($i34)
    end while
    if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      $use_smoothing0 := 0
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
      $use_smoothing0 := $use_smoothing0 - (($use_smoothing0 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $use_smoothing0, 31))
    end if
    $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $e0
    message("loaded_subarticulations: " & %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
    $result1 := $use_smoothing0
    $note_selection0 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
    $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($note_selection0 - (($result1 * $note_selection0) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($note_selection0 - (($result1 * $note_selection0) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($note_selection0 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $note_selection0))
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($note_selection0 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $note_selection0
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
        set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        else

        end if
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    end if
  end if
end function
function update_modwheel_assignment_control
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] + %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0]) * 225.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 225)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
  end if
end function
function update_modwheel_assignment_circles
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 3) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)] # -1)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      if($i = $selected_subarticulation)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      $result001 := %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $result000 := %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $seed00 := int(round((real($result001) / 127.) * real(31 + (sh_right($result001 - 32, 31) + 1))))
      $_ret870 := int((real($result000) / 127.) * 31.)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %center_circles_frame_sums[$seed00] + $_ret870)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $result001)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $result000)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function update_dynamic_range_control
  ?xy_dynamic_range[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
  ?xy_dynamic_range[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[0] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  $any_event_active1 := %modulation_positions[0]
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_cursor), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 3) + int((real((($any_event_active1 * (1 + (sh_right(127 - $any_event_active1, 31) .or. sh_right($any_event_active1 - 1, 31)))) - sh_right($any_event_active1 - 1, 31)) - (127 * sh_right(127 - $any_event_active1, 31))) / 127.) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))))
end function
function center_circle_distance
  ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength010 - 0.5
  ~fade_level00 := ~_ret6000 - 0.5
  ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 := sqrt((~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 * ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000) + (~fade_level00 * ~fade_level00))
end function
function center_circle_angle
  ~subarticulation_modulation_strength010 := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 - 0.5
  ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 := ~_ret6000 - 0.5
  ~weight0 := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength010 / sqrt((~subarticulation_modulation_strength010 * ~subarticulation_modulation_strength010) + (~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 * ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0))
  ~subarticulation_modulation_strength001 := acos(~weight0)
  if(~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 < 0.)
    ~subarticulation_modulation_strength001 := (2. * ~NI_MATH_PI) - ~subarticulation_modulation_strength001
  end if
  ~fade_level00 := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength001
end function
function angle_to_value
  ~subarticulation_modulation_strength010 := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength001 + (~NI_MATH_PI / 2.)
  if(~subarticulation_modulation_strength010 > (~NI_MATH_PI * 2.))
    ~subarticulation_modulation_strength010 := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength010 - (2. * ~NI_MATH_PI)
  end if
  ~subarticulation_modulation_strength010 := abs(~subarticulation_modulation_strength010 - (2. * ~NI_MATH_PI))
  $iii1 := int((127. * (~subarticulation_modulation_strength010 - ~weight0)) / (~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 - ~weight0))
end function
function update_keyswitch_settings
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_name), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_articulation_names[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_editor_keyswitch_icon), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %_articulation_icon[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] * -1)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(round(real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) + (real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.) - int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) * pow(real($i) / real(num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope)), (real(%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 100.) + 1.)))))
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - get_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function update_cc_slider_visibility
  if($use_expression = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_expression_slider), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_expression_slider), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_expression_slider), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_expression_slider), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  end if
end function
function set_key_colors
  $string0101 := 0
  while($string0101 <= 127) 
    set_key_color($string0101, $KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE)
    if(($string0101 >= %nki_range[0]) and ($string0101 <= %nki_range[1]))
      set_key_color($string0101, $KEY_COLOR_BLUE)
    end if
    inc($string0101)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 7) 
    set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_RED)
    if(%_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $i] = 1)
      set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_ORANGE)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function apply_scroll_offset
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
      set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function Preset______init__
  $Preset____free_idx := search(%Preset____allocation, 0)
  if($Preset____free_idx = -1)
    message("Error: No more free space available to allocate objects of type 'Preset'")
  end if
  %Preset____allocation[$Preset____free_idx] := 1
  %Preset____idx[$Preset____free_idx] := $i29100
  !Preset____name[$Preset____free_idx] := @ret1
  $event3 := %Preset____tags[$Preset____free_idx]
  $inst1 := 1
  $ks6 := $event3
  while($ks6 # -1) 
    $timing0 := 0
    %Floatmask____allocation[$ks6] := %Floatmask____allocation[$ks6] - $inst1
    if(%Floatmask____allocation[$ks6] > 0)
      $ks6 := -1
      continue
    else
      %Floatmask____allocation[$ks6] := 0
    end if
    $event3 := $ks6
    $ks6 := -1
    $timing0 := 0
    while($timing0 <= 1) 
      $_short_circuit30 := %_Floatmask____fm[($event3 * 2) + $timing0]
      $_ret560 := 1
      $articulation_id2 := $_short_circuit30
      while($articulation_id2 # -1) 
        $ret17 := 0
        %Bitlist____allocation[$articulation_id2] := %Bitlist____allocation[$articulation_id2] - $_ret560
        if(%Bitlist____allocation[$articulation_id2] > 0)
          $articulation_id2 := -1
          continue

        end if

        $articulation_id2 := -1
        $articulation_event_is_empty0 := $_short_circuit30
        $all_inactive0 := 0
        if($articulation_event_is_empty0 # -1)
          %Bitlist____val[$articulation_event_is_empty0] := 0
        end if
      end while
      inc($timing0)
    end while
    $i3700 := $event3
    $string020 := 0
    if($i3700 # -1)
      $_iter17 := 0
      while($_iter17 <= 1) 
        %_Floatmask____fm[($i3700 * 2) + $_iter17] := -1
        inc($_iter17)
      end while
    end if
  end while
  %Preset____tags[$Preset____free_idx] := $is_active0100
  $result3 := %Preset____tags[$Preset____free_idx]
  $ret18 := 1
  if($result3 # -1)
    %Floatmask____allocation[$result3] := %Floatmask____allocation[$result3] + $ret18
  end if
  %Preset____info[$Preset____free_idx] := $_ret28000
  !Preset____file[$Preset____free_idx] := @g_name0

end function

function Browser____validate_user_preset_idx

        inc($ret31)

        continue
      end if
      if($keyswitch2 = 1)
        continue
      end if

        $ret31 := 0
        $instrument3 := 1
        while((($instrument3 = 1) and ($keyswitch2 = 0)) and ($subarticulation_idx2 = 0)) 
          if(search(%user_preset_numbers, $ret31 + 999) # -1)
            inc($ret31)
          else
            $instrument3 := 0
          end if
        end while
        if($subarticulation_idx2 = 1)
          continue
        end if
        if($keyswitch2 = 1)
          continue
        end if
        $result9 := $ret31 + 999
        $subarticulation_idx2 := 1
        continue
        $keyswitch2 := 1
        continue
      end if
      $result9 := $note4
      $subarticulation_idx2 := 1
      continue
      $keyswitch2 := 1
      continue
    end while
    if($subarticulation_idx2 = 1)
      continue
    end if
  end while
end function

          end while
          $note1 := $string0101

function Scrollarea__is_idx_on_sight
  $interval1 := 0
  while($interval1 = 0) 
    $time1 := $scroll__up
    $countdown0 := $scroll__up + 18
    if(($velo0 >= $time1) and ($velo0 < $countdown0))
      $note9 := 1
      $interval1 := 1
      continue
    else
      $note9 := 0
      $interval1 := 1
      continue
    end if
  end while
end function
on persistence_changed
  call PresetBrowser__update_view
  $i280000 := %CC[1]
  call set_background_animation
  call update_all_ranges
  call update_minimal_delays
  $string0101 := $use_constant_delay
  call choose_mode
  call update_instrument_selector_menu
  $result3 := 0
  $articulation_id0 := %CC[1]
  call set_modulation_position
  $sli_modwheel_slider := %CC[1]
  if($use_expression = 1)
    $sli_expression_slider := %CC[$mnu_cc11]
  end if
  $result6 := 0
  call select_instrument_slot
  if(- sh_right(abs(%development[0] - 22714) - 1, 31) = 0)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_dev_set_outputs), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_version), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_unpurge_all), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_show_authoring_tools), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_articulation_icon), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)

  end if
end on
on note
  ignore_event($EVENT_ID)
  set_key_pressed($EVENT_NOTE, 1)
  %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $EVENT_NOTE
  call keyswitches_on_note
  if(($EVENT_NOTE >= %nki_range[0]) and ($EVENT_NOTE <= %nki_range[1]))
    $last_note_input_time := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    if(%pressed_keys[$EVENT_NOTE] = -1)
      %pressed_keys[$EVENT_NOTE] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
      %last_pressed[$EVENT_NOTE] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
      %key_velocity[$EVENT_NOTE] := $EVENT_VELOCITY
      inc($num_pressed_keys)
    end if
    $last_on_note_callback := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
    %uiid4[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $NOTE_SELECTION_TIME * 1000
    call wait_or_zero
    if($last_on_note_callback = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
      call update_selected_notes
      $_iter91400 := $_iter91400
    end if
  end if
end on
on release
  if(get_event_mark($EVENT_ID, $MARK_1) = 0)
    $last_release_callback := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
    ignore_event($EVENT_ID)
    %pressed_keys[$EVENT_NOTE] := -1
    %last_released[$EVENT_NOTE] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    dec($num_pressed_keys)
    if($sustain_pedal = 0)
      set_key_pressed($EVENT_NOTE, 0)
      $transition0 := $EVENT_NOTE
      call keyswitches_on_release
      message("release " & $EVENT_NOTE)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 0) 
        $instrument_slot6 := $i
        $note17 := $EVENT_NOTE
        call articulations_note_off
        $_iter801500 := $_iter801500
        inc($i)
      end while
      %uiid4[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $NOTE_SELECTION_TIME * 1000
      call wait_or_zero
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 0) 
        %_pressed_notes_per_instrument[($i * 128) + $EVENT_NOTE] := 0
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($last_release_callback = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
        call update_selected_notes
        $_iter8002300 := $_iter8002300
        $is_free1000 := $is_free1000
      end if
    end if
  end if
end on
on controller
  ignore_controller
  %controller_value[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 1000] := %CC[$CC_NUM]
  $last_controller_callback := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  if($CC_NUM = 1)
    $i280000 := %CC[1]
    call buffer_modwheel_animation
  end if
  if($CC_NUM = 64)
    if(%CC[64] > 63)
      $sustain_pedal_actual := 1
    else
      $sustain_pedal_actual := 0
      $sustain_pedal := 0
      $i := %nki_range[0]
      while($i <= %nki_range[1]) 
        if(%pressed_keys[$i] = -1)
          $ii := 0
          while($ii <= 0)

  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, (round((real($sli_trans_volume) / 1000.) * pow(10., 2.)) / pow(10., 2.)) & " + " & (round((real($sli_trans_volume_offset) / 1000.) * pow(10., 2.)) / pow(10., 2.)) & " dB")
end on
on ui_control($sli_trans_volume_offset)
  $sli_trans_volume_offset := (($sli_trans_volume_offset * (1 + (sh_right((get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_MAX_VALUE) - $sli_trans_volume) - $sli_trans_volume_offset, 31) .or. sh_right($sli_trans_volume_offset - - $sli_trans_volume, 31)))) - (- $sli_trans_volume * sh_right($sli_trans_volume_offset - - $sli_trans_volume, 31))) - ((get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_MAX_VALUE) - $sli_trans_volume) * sh_right((get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_MAX_VALUE) - $sli_trans_volume) - $sli_trans_volume_offset, 31))
  if($mnu_authoring_edit_all > 0)
    $string00000 := ((abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($mnu_authoring_edit_all - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) * $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer) * 128) * 25
    $string01000 := ((($mnu_authoring_edit_all + (abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($mnu_authoring_edit_all - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) * $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer)) * 128) * 25) - 1
    $i := $string00000
    while($i <= $string01000) 
      %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume_offset[$i] := $sli_trans_volume_offset
      inc($i)
    end while
  else
    %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($vlue_authoring_start_note * 25) + (abs($vlue_authoring_end_note - $vlue_authoring_start_note) + (- sh_right(- ($vlue_authoring_end_note - $vlue_authoring_start_note), 31) * 12)))] := $sli_trans_volume_offset
  end if
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, (round((real($sli_trans_volume) / 1000.) * pow(10., 2.)) / pow(10., 2.)) & " + " & (round((real($sli_trans_volume_offset) / 1000.) * pow(10., 2.)) / pow(10., 2.)) & " dB")
end on

  if($authoring_page_active = 1)
    $instrument1 := 0
    $keyswitch1 := 0
    $subarticulation_idx1 := 0
    call move_to_legato_buffer
    @g_name00 := "leg" & %_loaded_subarticulations[0]
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @g_name00 & "_sus_fade_in_time.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @g_name00 & "_sus_release_time.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @g_name00 & "_sus_wait_time.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @g_name00 & "_sus_trans_fade_in_time.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @g_name00 & "_sus_trans_fade_out_time.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @g_name00 & "_sus_trans_zone_start.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @g_name00 & "_sus_trans_zone_wait.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @g_name00 & "_sus_fade_in_time_offset.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @g_name00 & "_sus_release_time_offset.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @g_name00 & "_sus_wait_time_offset.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @g_name00 & "_sus_trans_fade_in_time_offset.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @g_name00 & "_sus_trans_fade_out_time_offset.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @g_name00 & "_sus_trans_zone_start_offset.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @g_name00 & "_sus_trans_zone_wait_offset.nka")
    save_array_str(%legato_data_buffer_all_transitions_volume_curve, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @g_name00 & "_all_transitions_volume_curve.nka")
  else
    message("No Legato Loaded")
  end if

end on
on ui_control($btn_load_authoring)
  if($authoring_page_active = 1)
    !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "leg" & %_loaded_subarticulations[0]
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_fade_in_time.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_release_time.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_wait_time.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_fade_in_time.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_fade_out_time.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_zone_start.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_zone_volume.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_fade_in_time_offset.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_release_time_offset.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_wait_time.nka_offset"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_fade_in_time_offset.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_fade_out_time_offset.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_zone_start_offset.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_zone_volume_offset.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%legato_data_buffer_all_transitions_volume_curve, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_all_transitions_volume_curve.nka"))
    $result6 := 0
    $transition0 := 0
    $layer0 := 0
    call move_legato_buffer_to_instrument
    $ret21 := 60
    $i280000 := 60
    $instrument1 := 0
    call update_authoring_transition
  else
    message("No Legato Loaded")
  end if
  $btn_load_authoring := 0
end on
on ui_control($btn_authoring_smooth_table)
  $string00000 := 0
  $string0200 := 0
  $string01000 := 0
  while($string01000 <= 127) 
    if($string01000 > 0)
      $string00000 := %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[$string01000 - 1]
    else
      $string00000 := %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[0]
    end if
    if($string01000 < 127)
      $string0200 := %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[$string01000 + 1]
    else
      $string0200 := %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[127]
    end if
    %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[$string01000] := (((%tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[$string01000] * 2) + $string00000) + $string0200) / 4
    %_legato_data_all_transitions_volume_curve[$string01000] := %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[$string01000]
    inc($string01000)
  end while
  $btn_authoring_smooth_table := 0
end on
on ui_control(%tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve)
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%repeat1) - 1)) 
    %repeat1[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  %repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%idx49) - 1)) 
    %idx49[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  wait(100000)
  if(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
    %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while(%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 127) 
      %_legato_data_all_transitions_volume_curve[%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
      inc(%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end while
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_credits_backdrop)
  call credits_close
end on
on ui_control($btn_show_authoring_tools)
  if($btn_show_authoring_tools = 1)
    call authoring_open
  else
    call authoring_close
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_dev_reload_all_legatos)
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%repeat1) - 1)) 
    %repeat1[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  %repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  while(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 1) 
    $_iter0 := 0
    while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%idx49) - 1)) 
      %idx49[$_iter0] := 0
      inc($_iter0)
    end while
    %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while(%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 8) 
      $_iter0 := 0
      while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%k0) - 1)) 
        %k0[$_iter0] := 0
        inc($_iter0)
      end while
      %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 4) 
        if(%_loaded_subarticulations[(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])] >= 0)
          if(%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])]]] = 2)
            !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "leg" & %_loaded_subarticulations[(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])]
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_fade_in_time.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_release_time.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_wait_time.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_fade_in_time.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_fade_out_time.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_zone_start.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_zone_volume.nka"))

end on
on ui_control($btn_mixer_preset_save)
  if($btn_mixer_preset_save = 1)
    %mixer_preset_array[0] := -212121
    %mixer_preset_array[1] := 0
    %mixer_preset_array[2] := 1
    %mixer_preset_array[3] := - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)
    $string0101 := 0
    while($string0101 <= 4) 
      %mixer_preset_array[4 + $string0101] := get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_enable[$string0101], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      %mixer_preset_array[9 + $string0101] := get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_volume[$string0101], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      %mixer_preset_array[14 + $string0101] := get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_pan[$string0101], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      %mixer_preset_array[19 + $string0101] := get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_rev_send[$string0101], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      %mixer_preset_array[24 + $string0101] := get_control_par(%mnu_mixer_channel_out[$string0101], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      inc($string0101)
    end while
    %mixer_preset_array[29] := $btn_mixer_eq_title
    %mixer_preset_array[30] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_low), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[31] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_mid), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[32] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_high), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[33] := $btn_mixer_comp_title
    %mixer_preset_array[34] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_compression), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[35] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_mix), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[36] := $btn_mixer_rev_title
    %mixer_preset_array[37] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_mixer_rev_preset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[38] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_rev_return), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[39] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    save_array(%mixer_preset_array, 0)
    $btn_mixer_preset_save := 0
  else
    $btn_mixer_preset_save := 1
  end if
end on

          %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_disable_input[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        else

          %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + (1 - $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel)] := 0

        $ii7 := 0
        $iii2 := 0

          inc($_iter0)
        end while
        $i41 := 0

  $string0200 := $keyswitch1
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_channel_bleed_channel_off), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[1 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_channel_bleed_channel_on), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)])
end on
on ui_control($btn_unpurge_all)
  if($btn_unpurge_all = 1)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%microphone_position_states) - 1)) 
      %microphone_position_states[$i] := 1
      inc($i)
    end while
  else
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%microphone_position_states) - 1)) 
      %microphone_position_states[$i] := 0
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
  $i41 := 0
  $ii7 := 0
  $iii2 := 0
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0) - 1)) 
    %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  $i41 := 0
  while($i41 <= 0) 
    $ii7 := 0
    while($ii7 <= 7) 
      $iii2 := 0
      while($iii2 <= 3) 
        if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($i41 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $iii2)] # -1)
          %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i41 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $iii2)]] := %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i41 * 32) + (($ii7 * 4) + $iii2)]] + %_keyswitch_purge_states[($i41 * 8) + $ii7]
        end if
        inc($iii2)
      end while
      inc($ii7)
    end while
    inc($i41)
  end while
  $i41 := 0
  while($i41 <= 511) 
    if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i41]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
      if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[$i41] = 0)
        $fade_time1 := $i41
        $subarticulation_event_id16 := 0
        $i := 0
        $subarticulation_event_id15 := $fade_time1
        call subarticulation_group_count
        $relative_bit0 := $fade_time0
        while($i <= ($relative_bit0 - 1)) 
          purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$fade_time1]] + $i) + 1, $subarticulation_event_id16 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
          inc($i)
          $subarticulation_event_id15 := $fade_time1
          call subarticulation_group_count
          $relative_bit0 := $fade_time0
        end while
        $_ret9100 := $relative_bit0
      end if
    end if
    inc($i41)
  end while
  $i41 := 0
  while($i41 <= 511) 
    if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i41]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
      if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[$i41] > 0)
        $fade_time1 := $i41
        $subarticulation_event_id16 := 1
        $i := 0
        $subarticulation_event_id15 := $fade_time1
        call subarticulation_group_count
        $relative_bit0 := $fade_time0
        while($i <= ($relative_bit0 - 1)) 
          purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$fade_time1]] + $i) + 1, $subarticulation_event_id16 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
          inc($i)
          $subarticulation_event_id15 := $fade_time1
          call subarticulation_group_count
          $relative_bit0 := $fade_time0
        end while
        $group_count000 := $relative_bit0
      end if
    end if
    inc($i41)
  end while
  $string0200 := $string0200
end on

on ui_control($mnu_mixer_rev_preset)
  %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $mnu_mixer_rev_preset
  wait_async(load_array_str(%reverb_preset_array, @REVERB_PRESET_PATH & "reverb_preset" & %uiid2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & ".nka"))
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_TYPE, %reverb_preset_array[0], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_PREDELAY, %reverb_preset_array[1], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_PREDELAY_UNIT, %reverb_preset_array[2], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_FEEDBACK, %reverb_preset_array[3], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_LOWSHELF, %reverb_preset_array[4], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_HIGHCUT, %reverb_preset_array[5], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DECAY, %reverb_preset_array[6], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_MOD, %reverb_preset_array[7], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_REVERB, %reverb_preset_array[8], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DIFFUSION, %reverb_preset_array[9], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_SIZE, %reverb_preset_array[10], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DAMPING, %reverb_preset_array[11], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_RATE, %reverb_preset_array[12], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_FREEZE, %reverb_preset_array[13], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_SPARSE, %reverb_preset_array[14], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
end on
