on ui_control($mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve)
  if($mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve = 0)
    %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 5
    %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 127
    %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 40
  else
    if($mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve = 1)
      %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 0
      %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 127
      %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 40
    else
      if($mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve = 2)
        %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 5
        %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 127
        %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 0
      else
        if($mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve = 3)
          %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 0
          %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 127
          %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 0
        else
          if($mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve = 4)
            %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 127
            %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 127
            %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 0
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
  end if
  call update_keyswitch_volume_curve
end on
on ui_control($btn_keyswitch_velocity_to_modwheel)
  %_articulation_mw_to_velocity[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_velocity_to_modwheel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
end on
on ui_control($btn_solo_subarticulation)
  %_subarticulations_solo_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $displayed_subarticulation)] := $btn_solo_subarticulation
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_solo_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
    $subarticulations_solo_states_any_active := 1
  else
    if(search(%_subarticulations_solo_states, 1) = -1)
      $subarticulations_solo_states_any_active := 0
    end if
  end if
  set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_solo[$displayed_subarticulation], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_solo_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
end on

  set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_mute[$displayed_subarticulation], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mute_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
end on

on ui_control(?xy_modwheel_assignment)
  ?xy_modwheel_assignment[1] := 1.
  ?xy_modwheel_assignment[5] := 1.
  if($NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE = $NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWN)
    if((get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 0) or (get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 4))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_fade_circle_md), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
  else
    if($NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE = $NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_UP)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_fade_circle_md), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    end if
  end if
  $ma_cb_id := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  if((get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 2) and (?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] <= ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]))
    if(?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] < ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2])
      ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] := ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]
    end if
    if(?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] > ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6])
      ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6]
    end if
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1)
      ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := 0.
    end if
    %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] * 127.)
  else
    if(((get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 0) and (?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] <= ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0])) and (?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] <= ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_fade_circle_md), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 20)))
      %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := int(round((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * 127.))
    else
      if(((get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 4) and (?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] <= ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4])) and (?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] <= ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6]))
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_fade_circle_md), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 20)))
        %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]) * 127.)
      else
        if((get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 6) and (?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] <= ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6]))
          if(?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] > ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6])
            ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6]
          end if
          %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] * 127.)
        end if
      end if
    end if
  end if
  wait(10000)
  if($ma_cb_id = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 2)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_value), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
    else
      if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 0)
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_value), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      else
        if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 4)
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_value), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
        else
          if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 6)
            set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_value), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    call update_modwheel_assignment_control
    call update_modwheel_assignment_circles
  end if
  wait(1990000)
  if($ma_cb_id = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_value), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "")
  end if
end on
on ui_control(?xy_dynamic_range)
  $dr_cb_id := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  if((get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_dynamic_range), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 0) and (?xy_dynamic_range[0] <= ?xy_dynamic_range[2]))
    %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := int(?xy_dynamic_range[0] * 127.)
  else
    if((get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_dynamic_range), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 2) and (?xy_dynamic_range[0] <= ?xy_dynamic_range[2]))
      %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := int(?xy_dynamic_range[2] * 127.)
    end if
  end if
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_dynamic_range), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1)
    %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := 0
    %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := 127
  end if
  wait(10000)
  if($dr_cb_id = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, int(?xy_dynamic_range[get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_dynamic_range), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX)] * 127.))
    call update_dynamic_range_control
  end if
  wait(1990000)
  if($dr_cb_id = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "")
  end if
end on

    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_regular")

    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

on ui_control(?xy_center_circles)
  $cc_cb_id := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(?angle2) - 1)) 
    ?angle2[$_iter0] := 0.
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%repeat1) - 1)) 
    %repeat1[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(?distance0) - 1)) 
    ?distance0[$_iter0] := 0.
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  if($NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE = $NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWN)
    ~subarticulation_modulation_strength010 := ?xy_center_circles[0]
    ~_ret6000 := ?xy_center_circles[1]
    call center_circle_distance
    ?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0
    ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 := ?xy_center_circles[0]
    ~_ret6000 := ?xy_center_circles[1]
    call center_circle_angle
    ?angle2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ~fade_level00
    ~subarticulation_modulation_strength001 := ?angle2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
    ~weight0 := 0.7
    ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 := (~NI_MATH_PI * 2.) - 0.7
    call angle_to_value
    %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $iii1
    %repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := (%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * (1 + (sh_right(127 - %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31) .or. sh_right(%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31)))) - (127 * sh_right(127 - %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31))
    if((?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] >= 0.14) and (?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 0.175))
      $selected_subarticulation := 3
    else
      if((?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] >= 0.175) and (?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 0.21))
        $selected_subarticulation := 2
      else
        if((?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] >= 0.21) and (?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 0.242))
          $selected_subarticulation := 1
        else
          if((?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] >= 0.242) and (?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 0.29))
            $selected_subarticulation := 0
          else
            $selected_subarticulation := -1
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
      if(abs(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) < 10)
        $selected_circle_end := 0
      else
        if(abs(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) < 10)
          $selected_circle_end := 1
        else
          $selected_circle_end := -1
        end if
      end if
    else
      $selected_circle_end := -1
    end if
    call update_subarticulation_selection
  end if
  if($NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE = $NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DRAG)
    wait(10000)
    if(($cc_cb_id = $NI_CALLBACK_ID) and ($selected_circle_end # -1))
      ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 := ?xy_center_circles[0]
      ~_ret6000 := ?xy_center_circles[1]
      call center_circle_angle
      ?angle2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ~fade_level00
      ~subarticulation_modulation_strength001 := ?angle2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      ~weight0 := 0.7
      ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 := (~NI_MATH_PI * 2.) - 0.7
      call angle_to_value
      %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $iii1
      %repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := (%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * (1 + (sh_right(127 - %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31) .or. sh_right(%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31)))) - (127 * sh_right(127 - %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31))
      if($selected_circle_end = 0)
        if(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < ((%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) - %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]))
          %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := %repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
        end if
      else
        if($selected_circle_end = 1)
          if(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > ((%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] + %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) + %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]))
            %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := %repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
          end if
        end if
      end if
      call update_modwheel_assignment_control
      call update_modwheel_assignment_circles
    end if
  end if
end on

  %_articulation_icon[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := $mnu_articulation_icon
  call update_keyswitch_settings

on ui_control($mnu_settings_keyswitch_position)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 7) 
    set_key_pressed(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, %KEY_DOWN[($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i])
    set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_WHITE)
    inc($i)
  end while
  $keyswitch_octave := $mnu_settings_keyswitch_position
  call update_keyswitch_selection
end on

  $use_expression := 1 + sh_right(abs($mnu_cc11) - 1, 31)
  call update_cc_slider_visibility
end on

on ui_control($btn_factory_reset)
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%repeat1) - 1)) 
    %repeat1[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%idx49) - 1)) 
    %idx49[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%k0) - 1)) 
    %k0[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  %repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  while(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 0) 
    %octave_layer[%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := 0
    %octave_shift[%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := 0
    %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while(%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 7) 
      !_articulation_names[(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 8) + %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := "Empty"
      %_articulation_volume_min[(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 8) + %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := 5
      %_articulation_volume_max[(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 8) + %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := 127
      %_articulation_volume_curve[(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 8) + %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := 0
      %_articulation_humanization[(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 8) + %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := 0
      %_articulation_release[(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 8) + %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := -1
      %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
        %_loaded_subarticulations[(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])] := -1
        %_loaded_subarticulations_start[(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])] := 0
        %_loaded_subarticulations_end[(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])] := 127
        %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])] := 0
        %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])] := 0
        %_loaded_subarticulations_volume[(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])] := 0
        %_loaded_subarticulations_tightness[(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])] := 0
        %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])] := 0
        %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])] := 127
        %_loaded_subarticulations_vibrato[(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])] := 0
        %_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])] := 0
        %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_volume[(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])] := 0
        %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed[(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])] := 0
        %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed_auto[(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])] := 1
        inc(%k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      inc(%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end while
    inc(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end while
  call load_kontakt_effects
  $selected_instrument := 0
  $selected_keyswitch := 0
  %_keyswitch_states[0] := 1
end on
on ui_control($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty)
  $btn_subarticulation_browser_empty := 1
  %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := -1
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "    Empty")
  call apply_scroll_offset
end on
on ui_control($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar)
  $string01000 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * (1 + (sh_right($string01000 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), 31) .or. sh_right(get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), 31)))) - ($string01000 * sh_right($string01000 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), 31)))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($string01000 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $string01000))
  $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($string01000 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $string01000
  call apply_scroll_offset
end on
on ui_control($btn_save_cancel)
  $btn_save_cancel := 0
  $i280000 := $btn_save_cancel
  call UserSaveStrip__show

    $next_free_idx00 := %self49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
    call Browser____filter_presets
  end if
  @path20 := @path20
  if(%Browser____current_state[$browser] = 0)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scan_presets_animation), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scan_info), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_scan_presets), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_disable_input), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    call PresetBrowser__update_view
  else
    if(%Browser____current_state[$browser] = 2)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scan_presets_animation), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scan_info), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_scan_presets), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_scan_info), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Scanning... " & $scanning_preset_count & " presets found")
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_disable_input), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_confirm_browser)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_confirm_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  $transition0 := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_confirm_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
  call PresetBrowser__show
end on
on ui_control($btn_cancel_browser)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_cancel_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  $transition0 := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_cancel_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
  call PresetBrowser__show
end on
on ui_control($btn_preset_browser_backdrop)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_browser_backdrop), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
end on
on ui_control($btn_ks_selector0)
  $articulation_id0 := 0
  call PresetBrowser__update_ks_selector
end on
on ui_control($btn_ks_selector1)
  $articulation_id0 := 1
  call PresetBrowser__update_ks_selector
end on
on ui_control($btn_ks_selector2)
  $articulation_id0 := 2
  call PresetBrowser__update_ks_selector
end on
on ui_control($btn_ks_selector3)
  $articulation_id0 := 3
  call PresetBrowser__update_ks_selector
end on
on ui_control($btn_ks_selector4)
  $articulation_id0 := 4
  call PresetBrowser__update_ks_selector
end on
on ui_control($btn_ks_selector5)
  $articulation_id0 := 5
  call PresetBrowser__update_ks_selector
end on
on ui_control($btn_ks_selector6)
  $articulation_id0 := 6
  call PresetBrowser__update_ks_selector
end on
on ui_control($btn_ks_selector7)
  $articulation_id0 := 7
  call PresetBrowser__update_ks_selector
end on
on async_complete
  if($NI_ASYNC_ID = $preset__load_id)
    if($NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS = 1)
      $preset__load_id := -1
    else
      if($NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS = 0)
        $preset__load_id := 0
      end if
    end if
  end if
end on
